title: SKINCARE CUSTOMER SERVICE AGENT
description:
CUSTOMER SERVICE AGENT – SKINCARE EXPERIENCE ONLY

Premium Skincare |
 & Chat Support | Remote (LA/PST Schedule)



Schedule: Monday – Friday

Hours: 5:00 AM – 1:00 PM PST

Channels:
 & Live Chat

Experience Required: 5+ Years

Compensation: $5.00 USD/hr via PayPal



---



READ BEFORE APPLYING



We are not hiring general customer service agents.

We are hiring specialists.



Only apply if you have ALL of the following:

• Direct skincare or beauty brand experience

• Hands-on Shopify experience

• Subscription / recurring billing experience



If you do not meet all three, your application will not be reviewed.



This role is for high-level agents who take pride in precision, ownership, and performance. If you rely on templates or need constant guidance, this is not the right fit.



---



THE ROLE



You are the voice of a premium skincare brand built on decades of expertise, clean formulations, and customer trust.



Every message you send must feel personal, intentional, and high-quality. There are no scripts. No templates. Every response is written from scratch.



You will:

• Handle
 and live chat support with speed and accuracy

• Guide customers through skincare questions with confidence

• Resolve issues end-to-end using Shopify

• Maintain a calm, professional, and brand-aligned tone at all times



---



NON-NEGOTIABLE REQUIREMENTS



• Minimum 5+ years of proven, high-level customer service experience

• Direct experience supporting skincare or beauty brands

• Near-native English writing (natural, fluent, no awkward phrasing)

• Strong Shopify experience (orders, refunds, accounts, troubleshooting)

• Experience handling subscriptions (billing, cancellations, retention)

• Ability to work independently and make decisions without hand-holding

• Fully available Monday–Friday, 5:00 AM–1:00 PM PST



---



INFRASTRUCTURE REQUIREMENTS



You must be fully prepared to work remotely without interruption.



• Stable high-speed internet (minimum 25 Mbps)

• Backup internet ready at all times (hotspot or secondary connection)

• Backup power solution (UPS or equivalent)

• Quiet, distraction-free workspace



Reliability is not optional. Customers should never feel disruptions.



---



WHAT YOU WILL DO



• Write clear, warm, and effective responses — every time

• Provide expert-level product guidance for skincare customers

• Handle shipping, returns, and order issues with confidence

• Learn product lines and ingredients quickly and communicate with authority

• Identify patterns in customer feedback and contribute insights



---



BRAND STANDARDS



You must align with and communicate these clearly:



• Simple, high-performance skincare — no unnecessary complexity

• Clean, cruelty-free, and conscious formulations

• Small-batch, high-quality production

• Confidence at every age — no unrealistic beauty standards



---



COMPENSATION



$5.00 USD per hour via PayPal

Long-term, stable role for the right candidate



We invest in people who perform and stay consistent.



---



HOW TO APPLY



Submit your resume and a short cover letter answering:



• Describe your skincare experience (brands, products, responsibilities)

• How would you handle a “delivered but not received” customer?

• Describe your Shopify experience in detail

• What is your internet and backup setup?

• Where are you located in the Philippines?

• How many
s/chats can you handle daily?



Applications that do not answer these questions clearly will not be considered.



---



Equal opportunity employer. We value skill, discipline, and professionalism.

title: Instagram Content & Creator Management VA (Manual Posting + Repurposing)
description:
We are looking for a highly organized and detail-oriented VA to help manage our Instagram content and coordinate with multiple creators.



This is an execution role, not a strategy role.



You will be responsible for ensuring all content is fully prepared, organized, and ready before posting across platforms.



This role supports a growing content and marketing team, so attention to detail, consistency, and reliability are critical.



We value people who take initiative and improve systems—not just follow instructions.



If you enjoy organizing content, working within clear systems, and making sure nothing falls through the cracks, this role is a great fit.





About Us



We are an online health and fitness education company focused on helping women improve pelvic health through exercise-based programs.



Our content is educational, practical, and designed to help women reduce symptoms like leaking, pelvic pressure, and discomfort—without relying on invasive treatments.





Responsibilities



- Content Posting (Primary)

- Manually post Instagram Reels and posts

- Format captions cleanly (spacing, readability, emojis if applicable)

- Add hashtags and tags

- Select covers/thumbnails

- Ensure content is posted correctly and on time

- Content Repurposing

- Take Instagram content and repost it to:

        - TikTok

        - YouTube Shorts

        -
 Reels

        - Adjust captions slightly per platform if needed

- Creator Coordination

- Manage content from ~5 creators (10+ posts per month)

- Track who has submitted content and who hasn’t

- Follow up on deadlines

- Organize all incoming content





Content Preparation (Light Editing)



- Add captions/subtitles to videos (using provided tools/software)

- Add simple text overlays or intro banners when needed

- Trim or adjust clips for platform requirements

- Prepare videos for posting across Instagram, TikTok, and YouTube Shorts



Advanced or creative editing is handled by our editing team.





Content Organization



- Maintain a simple content tracker (Google Sheets or Notion)

- Track status: Not Ready / Ready / Posted

- Keep folders and files organized

- Ensure nothing gets missed





Communication



- Provide clear updates on what is posted and what is pending

- Ask questions when something is unclear

- Flag missing assets or issues early





Important Notes



You will NOT be responsible for strategy or content ideas

You will NOT be writing long-form copy from scratch

You WILL be responsible for execution, organization, and consistency





Requirements



- Experience posting Instagram Reels manually

- Familiar with TikTok, Instagram, and YouTube Shorts formatting

- Strong written English (for captions and communication)

- Highly organized and detail-oriented

- Reliable and responsive

- Able to follow systems and improve them over time





Bonus (Not Required)



- Experience managing multiple creators

- Experience with content tracking systems (Notion, Google Sheets)

- Understanding of short-form content formats





Trial Process



Shortlisted candidates will be invited to a paid 1-week trial.



During the trial, you will:



- Work with 5–10 pieces of content

- Prepare posts for Instagram and other platforms

- Organize content in a tracker

- Communicate progress clearly





How to Apply (IMPORTANT – read carefully)



To be considered, follow these steps exactly:



- Start your application title with the word: BUFF

- Share links to 2–3 Instagram accounts you have helped manage

- Record a short Loom video (2–3 minutes) explaining:

         - How you would organize content from multiple creators

         - How you would make sure nothing is missed



Applications that do not follow these steps will not be reviewed.





Compensation



Paid trial: $50–$100 (1 week)



This role will start part-time (20–30 hours/week) and grow into a larger/full-time position as content volume increases.

Monthly compensation will be discussed based on experience and adjusted as responsibilities grow.

title: Accounting Manager
description:
Position Overview:

We are seeking a professional and detail-oriented Accounting Manager to oversee daily accounting operations. This role will be responsible for managing Accounts Payable (AP), Accounts Receivable (AR), and General Ledger (GL) functions while ensuring accuracy, compliance, and timely financial reporting. The ideal candidate is dependable, organized, and willing to work overtime when needed to meet deadlines.



Key Responsibilities:

 • Oversee and manage Accounts Payable (AP) and Accounts Receivable (AR) processes

 • Maintain and reconcile the General Ledger (GL)

 • Prepare monthly, quarterly, and annual financial reports

 • Ensure accurate and timely month-end and year-end closing

 • Monitor cash flow and support budgeting processes

 • Ensure compliance with company policies and accounting standards

 • Supervise and support accounting staff as needed

 • Assist with audits and provide required documentation

 • Work overtime when necessary to meet reporting deadlines



Qualifications:

 • Bachelor’s degree in Accounting, Finance, or related field

 • Proficiency in accounting software and Microsoft Excel

 • Strong attention to detail and organizational skills

 • Professional communication and interpersonal skills

 • Ability to meet deadlines and work overtime when required



Work Environment:

 • Professional office environment

 • Overtime required during peak periods and month-end/year-end close



We need someone who is a DOER, RELIABLE and willing to work overtime.

s, appointments, and correspondence

title: Bank Funding Specialist (USA Banks)
description:
We are looking for an experienced banking professional who has real connections inside U.S. banks.

This is not an entry-level VA role.



What We Really Need

Someone who:

Has direct access to U.S. bank representatives or branch managers 
, phone, or active contact)

Has worked inside a U.S. bank, credit union, lending company, or broker office

Understands how high-limit approvals are influenced

Has firsthand experience with real approvals — not just theory



Types of Approvals We Target

You should understand how approvals work for:

$50,000+ business credit cards

$75,000–$100,000 business lines of credit

High-limit unsecured business funding



We want someone who has personally seen or assisted with these types of approvals.



Your Role

Share real-world insight on how banks approve higher limits

Help identify which banks are currently approving strong funding amounts

Leverage your banking contacts when appropriate

Help structure borrower profiles to increase approval odds

Assist in building an internal lender intelligence system



To Apply, Send:



Your resume

Answers to these questions:

Do you currently have access to U.S. bank reps or branch managers?

What is the highest business credit limit you’ve seen approved?

What profile typically qualifies for $50K+ business credit cards?

title: MS Power Platform & Data Developer
description:
Full-Time Microsoft Power Platform & Data Developer

TCH Industries — Northeast Ohio, USA

Employment Type: Full-Time, Dedicated (40 hrs/week)

Location: Remote (Philippines preferred)

Compensation: Commensurate with experience and certifications



THE MISSION

We are building a full data and AI enablement layer across the entire business. Every functional area will eventually be touched by this work:

• Sales and quoting

• Finance and reporting

• Operations and production scheduling

• Quality and ISO 9001

• HR

• EOS (Entrepreneurial Operating System)

• Safety and compliance

You will work directly with the CEO, other AI professionals, and leadership team to design and build the systems that make this possible. The work is structured in phases, starting with the Microsoft Power Platform stack and expanding from there.



WHAT YOU'LL BUILD

In the near term, your work will center on:

Copilot Studio Agent Architecture

• Agents designed and created for all workflows that can benefit from AI

• Agent knowledge bases built on SharePoint Lists and document libraries

• Integration of SQL data exports as structured knowledge sources for agents

Power Automate

• Workflow automations connecting our ERP (TRULINX/SQL) to Microsoft 365 tools

• Document processing flows, notification systems, and approval workflows

• Microsoft Forms to Planner ticketing and task management flows

SharePoint Online / Microsoft Lists

• Structured list and library architecture to support agent knowledge retrieval

• Organized document repositories by function (Sales, Quality, ISO, EOS, Finance, etc.)

SQL & Power BI

• Connecting SQL data exports to Power Platform and Power BI

• Executive Dashboard - Building operational and financial dashboards for leadership

• Supporting a financial intelligence layer that enables natural language querying of business data

Power Apps

• Internal-facing apps for production, quality, scheduling, and operational workflows as the roadmap develops

• VMI and CRM apps to capture information on site with the customer



REQUIRED SKILLS

You must have real, demonstrable experience with the following — not just familiarity:

• Microsoft Copilot Studio — agent building, knowledge sources, topic design, orchestration

• Microsoft Power Automate — cloud flows, HTTP/API calls, connectors

• SharePoint Online / Microsoft Lists — list architecture, library design, Power Platform integration

• SQL — reading, querying, and connecting data to Power Platform

• Power BI — dashboard and report building

• Microsoft 365 ecosystem — Teams, Forms, Planner, OneDrive

• Microsoft Power Apps — Canvas apps for data entry and query

• Strong written and spoken English



PREFERRED CERTIFICATIONS

List all certifications you hold. Strong preference for candidates with one or more of the following:

• PL-100 — Microsoft Power Platform App Maker

• PL-200 — Microsoft Power Platform Functional Consultant

• PL-400 — Microsoft Power Platform Developer

• PL-600 — Microsoft Power Platform Solution Architect

• DP-900 or DP-300 — Data Fundamentals or Database Administration

Certifications matter to us, but a strong portfolio of real shipped work can substitute. Be specific about what you have built.



WHAT WE'RE LOOKING FOR IN A PERSON

• Able to work 8:00 to 4:30 EST

• You can take direction, ask smart questions, and execute without constant supervision

• You are honest about gaps and resourceful enough to close them

• You want to grow with a company long-term, not just complete a project

• You take pride in your work



TO APPLY — PLEASE INCLUDE ALL OF THE FOLLOWING

Applications missing these items will not be reviewed.

Step 1: Submit Your Application 

Include the following: 

1. Your Resume/CV 

Highlight SQL Server, Power Apps, and Power BI experience 

Include specific projects or dashboards you've built 

List any relevant certifications 

2. Portfolio/Work Samples (REQUIRED) 

Screenshots or links to Power BI dashboards you've created 

Examples of Power Apps you've built 

SQL queries or database projects you're proud of 

Note: Can be anonymized/sample data if needed 

3. Cover Letter addressing: 

Why are you interested in working remotely for a US manufacturing company? 

Describe a complex dashboard you built - what problem did it solve? 

What's your experience with manufacturing/distribution data? 

What's your preferred work schedule for overlapping with US Eastern Time? 

Step 2: Complete our Culture Index Survey 

This is required for your application to be reviewed. There are not right or wrong answers. There are no right or wrong answers. It simply gives us insight into how you view yourself regarding work-related traits. These traits and this survey tool help us better communicate with, train, and manage our employees.  



Please copy and paste this link into a new web browser: 
 



Step 3: Send Everything To 
 

Subject Line: "MS Power Platform Developer - [Your Name]" 



WHO WE ARE

TCH Industries is an industrial distribution company in Northeast Ohio, USA specializing in hose assemblies, fluid power systems, and fluid dispensing equipment. We are executing an aggressive AI and data integration strategy across the entire business.

We run Microsoft 365, use Trulinx as our ERP, and have SQL Server as our database backbone. We are building our AI capabilities on Microsoft Copilot Studio as Phase 1, with additional AI platforms (including Claude by Anthropic) planned as the work matures.

This is not a maintenance role. You will be the first dedicated technical hire for this initiative — brought on to build something that does not exist yet in our industry.

title: Digital Marketing Specialist
description:
URGENT HIRING ***Please include your resume when submitting your application.***



Digital Reach is a global HubSpot Platinum Partner agency providing complete digital solutions across the cloud and the entire customer journey.



As a Digital Marketing Specialist, you will be instrumental in the successful execution, optimization, and analysis of our clients' digital marketing campaigns. This role is ideal for someone with 2-4 years of experience in paid ad management across search engine marketing (SEM), Meta, and LinkedIn and who thrives in a fast-paced agency environment. In this role, you’ll be collaborating with seasoned professionals and will work closely with your Marketing Consultant and Campaign Director.



You will assist in the analysis and optimization of accounts, provide strategic guidance, and contribute to budget allocation decisions. You will be a major contributor to sophisticated multi-channel marketing initiatives across platforms such as Meta, LinkedIn, Google, Bing, and OTT/CTV, where responsibilities will also include ensuring that all campaign assets are in place, coordinating with various tea
mbers to meet project deadlines, and maintaining comprehensive records of all campaign-related activities.



Role & Responsibilities

- Analyze campaigns at the pre-defined cadence, suggest optimizations, and ensure updates are documented appropriately. Continuously analyze campaign data, uncover insights, and translate them into recommendations to optimize performance.

- Offer strategic input and budget allocation suggestions.

- Collaborate with the Campaign Director to carry out campaign builds and optimizations. Ensure all campaign assets are implemented in-platform and prepared for final internal quality control (QC checks).

- Assist in preparing and updating client reporting decks in coordination with the Marketing Operations team and Marketing Consultant.

- Work with the Campaign Director to create and refine target audiences in collaboration with various vendors (eg. Bombora, Simplifi, etc.).

- Develop a strong conceptual understanding of each client’s business model, marketing objectives, and campaign strategy, and demonstrate the ability to shift between accounts with different goals (e.g., lead generation vs. brand awareness) while optimizing tactics accordingly.

- Manage campaign experiments, from setup to tracking results.

- Regularly monitor campaigns to ensure full-funnel execution post-launch.

- Check ad platforms at predefined cadences to ensure budget spending aligns with expectations and troubleshoot issues as needed.

- Facilitate communication between internal teams to ensure all deadlines are met, and campaign needs are addressed.

- Maintain clear documentation of optimizations, suggestions, and feedback.

- Troubleshoot and resolve platform errors and recommendations with the Campaign Director.



Candidates Must Have:

- 2-4 years of in-platform digital marketing optimization experience, preferably in an agency setting.

- Experience with LinkedIn, Meta, and DSP platforms, including proficiency in display ads.

- Experience working in HubSpot or similar marketing automation platforms.

- Familiarity with Google Ads and SEO/SEM principles.

- Experience with various marketing automation tasks, such as list building, workflow building, form building, etc.

- Experience with reporting and analysis tools, including building reports and presenting insights.

- Strong optimization skills and attention to detail.

- Excellent written and verbal communication skills.

- Ability to multitask and manage multiple assignments in a fast-paced environment.

- Proven ability to work both independently and collaboratively.



Bonus Points If You Have: Agency experience.



This Position Reports To: Campaign Director



Working Hours: This is a remote-only position working US business hours. Applicants must be available to work either a graveyard shift (8:00 PM – 5:00 AM PH time) or a bridge shift (3:00 AM – 12:00 NN PH time).



You Should Know: This isn’t the place for everyone. You’ll have a lot of autonomy, but the expectations are high, the work is fast-paced, and the hats are many. We’re looking for people with grit who take ownership, see the big picture, and are always thinking about how we can do even better the next time.



Compensation and Benefits: Digital Reach offers a competitive salary for this role, depending on location and experience. You’ll also receive a benefits package which could include up to 6 weeks of PTO (including sick leave, holidays, and time off for vacation, etc.) depending on your location.



Timeline: Applicants who pass the initial screen can expect video screening questions and initial behavioral/cognitive testing within a week of submitting your application. We are hiring for this position for an immediate start but will adjust the timeline for the right candidate.



Additional Information: If you read this job description and think that you might be a good fit, even if you don’t meet all of the requirements, please go ahead and apply. We aim to create opportunities for marginalized populations and communities and are willing to train for this role.





Digital Reach provides equal employment opportunity to all employees and applicants without regard to race, religion, age, ancestry, gender, gender identity, sex, sexual orientation, national origin, citizenship status, physical or mental disability, veteran status, marital status, or any other characteristic protected by applicable law.





URGENT HIRING ***Please include your resume when submitting your application.***

title: ManyChat Expert | DM Automation & Marketing Funnels
description:
Type: Contract / Part-time (Wovvo Internal)

Location: Fully remote Start: Paid test project first. If you crush it, you’re in-house contractor.

Tools: ManyChat (required), Slack, Notion, GoHighLevel (bonus)

Compensation: Hourly rate (discussed after screening)

Team: 10+ Employees Across Canada/USA | 2+ VA's from Philippines | 5+ worldwide



>> ABOUT WOVVO

Canadian based business in the UGC Creator space (User Generated Content).



>> THE ROLE

We're hiring an in-house ManyChat expert to design, build, and manage the automation systems that power Wovvo's growth. This is NOT a basic chatbot role. You'll own the systems behind our lead generation, creator engagement, and membership lifecycle,  from onboarding to retention to reactivation. This role directly impacts revenue.



>> WHAT YOU’LL BUILD

Instagram DM automations (triggered by mentions/tags)

Creator qualification funnels

Giveaway tracking + engagement loops

Lead conversion flows (DM ? booked calls)

Tag-based user state system (member vs non-member vs expired)

Engagement tracking and behavior loops

Membership lifecycle automation (new leads ? active ? expired ? reactivation)



>> REQUIREMENTS

Advanced ManyChat experience (not beginner/intermediate)

Strong understanding of automation logic, conditional flows, tagging systems, and user segmentation

Proven experience building lead funnels and DM-based conversion systems

Can think in systems, user journeys, and lifecycle stages,  not just individual flows

Can explain WHY you build flows a certain way, not just how



>> DO NOT APPLY IF

You only build simple chatbot flows or rely heavily on templates

You need step-by-step instructions to execute

You don't understand segmentation or user states



>> PAID TEST PROJECT

Shortlisted candidates will complete a paid test project. You'll be given a real marketing scenario and asked to design a ManyChat automation system, explain your logic, and show how you'd scale it. We evaluate system thinking, clarity, execution strategy, and understanding of user behavior.



>> HOW TO APPLY

1.Examples of ManyChat flows you've built

4.Your availability / working hours



>> BONUS

What else in Marketing can you do? 

Are you a GHL expert as well?

Do you do Meta Ads?



Can't wait to meet you!!!

We are small team that feels like a family.

title: AMAZING VIDEO EDITOR WANTED FOR 7-FIGURE ECOM BUSINESS
description:
Hey there,



My team and I are looking for a new tea
mber to join our amazing 7-figure eCommerce dropshipping business team. Currently we are in need of someone that is responsible for a very important task of this business, direct response video editing and graphic photo ads for our paid marketing.

It's essential that you are experienced with eCommerce/dropshipping and creating high-converting video and photo ads. 

You will need to build scroll-stopping video ads and static graphic ads from scratch, as well as translate and localize our existing winning ads into different languages.



Please read the 4R model below for all the information that we expect, such as Role, Responsibilities, Results and Requirements.



Department: Content Creation & Marketing Department

Reports To: Process Manager / CEO



ROLE

Providing scroll-stopping, high-converting video and photo ads on a daily basis. You are the person responsible for the most crucial part of our marketing: getting the customer's attention. You ensure that every ad is built with a strong direct response framework, whether you are creating a video or static image from scratch, or translating a winning ad into a new language.



RESPONSIBILITIES

Creating high-quality, engaging video ads and static photo ads for platforms like Meta 
/Instagram) from scratch, using raw footage, images, UGC, or sourced clips.

Translating and localizing existing winning ads into different languages, adjusting text overlays, captions, and integrating AI voiceovers if necessary.

Ensuring every video and graphic has a strong hook, good visual hierarchy, and a clear Call to Action.

Knowing how to work with professional editing software. You are completely free to choose which software you prefer to use (e.g., Premiere Pro, CapCut, After Effects, Photoshop, Canva, etc.), as long as the end result is high-converting. Maintaining a certain benchmark that is created by the Process Manager.



RESULTS

Being able to deliver 3-5 high-converting video ads or 10-15 photo ads per day.

Making sure all the work is finished within a certain time frame.

Thinking along with the CEO and Process Manager to create perfect visual marketing concepts and hooks.

Improving yourself and the results everyday.



REQUIREMENTS

- You speak & write English fluently and have a great eye for formatting translated texts accurately.

- You have experience with eCommerce and know what the requirements of a high-converting direct response video or photo ad are.

- Being able to use different kind of systems & programs that are used for professional video and photo editing.

- You have an excellent eye for marketing angles, visual design, and viral trends.

- You’re in the possession of internet and a computer that can handle video rendering and graphic design.

title: AI Copilot Specialist
description:
Fractional AI & Copilot Studio Specialist

TCH Industries — Northeast Ohio, USA

Employment Type: Fractional / Part-Time (hours vary by project phase)

Location: Remote

Compensation: Hourly or monthly retainer — open to discussion



THE ROLE

This is a rare opportunity to get in early on a company-wide AI transformation and help shape it from the ground up. You will work directly with our CEO and full-time Power Platform developer as a trusted technical partner — helping architect our AI vision, making key design decisions, and rolling up your sleeves on the most complex and interesting builds as they arise.

The work spans every part of the business: sales intelligence, financial reporting, production and scheduling, quality systems, ISO compliance, and more. You will help us determine how all of it gets connected, automated, and enhanced through AI — starting with Microsoft Copilot Studio and expanding from there into whatever platforms best serve the mission, including Claude and other leading AI tools.

Your engagement will flex with the work. Some phases will call for deep collaboration and hands-on building. Others will be lighter — a few hours of guidance or architecture review. What stays constant is the relationship. We are looking for someone who wants to be our long-term AI partner as this vision grows in scale and ambition.



WHAT YOU'LL BE ENGAGED ON

• Copilot Studio architecture — multi-agent design including orchestrator/router logic, agent scoping, knowledge source strategy, and integration patterns

• Complex agent builds — hands-on development when the work exceeds the developer's current capability

• AI platform strategy — advising on when to use Copilot Studio vs. Claude API vs. other models, and how to integrate across platforms

• Prompt engineering — designing and refining system prompts, agent instructions, and knowledge grounding strategies

• Power Platform integration patterns — connecting Copilot agents to SQL, SharePoint, Power Automate, and external APIs

• Quality review — periodic review of what the developer has built to identify gaps, inefficiencies, or architectural risks



REQUIRED SKILLS

• Microsoft Copilot Studio — deep, demonstrated expertise in multi-agent architecture

• Power Automate — complex flow design and integration

• Microsoft 365 / SharePoint — data source architecture for AI agents

• Claude API (Anthropic) or other LLM APIs — hands-on integration experience

• Prompt engineering — proven ability to write and refine system-level prompts for production agents

• Strong written English — you must be able to explain complex concepts clearly to a non-technical CEO



PREFERRED CERTIFICATIONS

List all certifications you hold. Strong preference for candidates with one or more of the following:

• PL-600 — Microsoft Power Platform Solution Architect

• AI-102 — Microsoft Azure AI Engineer Associate (nice to have — signals depth in the Microsoft AI ecosystem beyond Copilot Studio)

• Any Microsoft AI or Copilot-specific certifications issued after 2024



IDEAL BACKGROUND

You have built and shipped multi-agent Copilot Studio systems in a real business environment. You understand the difference between a demo and a production deployment. You are comfortable working across AI platforms and have a clear opinion about when Microsoft's stack is the right tool and when it is not. You communicate like a senior practitioner, not a vendor.



TO APPLY — PLEASE INCLUDE ALL OF THE FOLLOWING

Applications missing these items will not be reviewed.

Step 1: Submit Your Application

Include the following:

1. Your Resume/CV

Highlight SQL Server, Power Apps, and Power BI experience

Include specific projects or dashboards you've built

List any relevant certifications

2. Portfolio/Work Samples (REQUIRED)

Screenshots or links to Power BI dashboards you've created

Note: Can be anonymized/sample data if needed

3. Cover Letter addressing:

Why are you interested in working remotely for a US manufacturing company?

Step 2: Complete our Culture Index Survey

This is required for your application to be reviewed. There are not right or wrong answers. There are no right or wrong answers. It simply gives us insight into how you view yourself regarding work-related traits. These traits and this survey tool help us better communicate with, train, and manage our employees.

WHO WE ARE

TCH Industries is an industrial distribution company in Northeast Ohio, USA specializing in hose assemblies, fluid power systems, and fluid dispensing equipment. We are executing an aggressive AI and data integration strategy across the entire business.

We run Microsoft 365, use Trulinx as our ERP, and have SQL Server as our database backbone. We are building our AI capabilities on Microsoft Copilot Studio as Phase 1, with additional AI platforms (including Claude by Anthropic) planned as the work matures.

This is not a maintenance role. You will be the first dedicated technical hire for this initiative — brought on to build something that does not exist yet in our industry.

title: Video Content  Producer
description:
We are hiring a  Video Content  Producer to take ownership of course production, long-form content, and multi-platform distribution.



This is not a narrow production role. It is a seat responsible for turning ideas, frameworks, and working sessions into finished assets that are structured, published, and performing.



There are ten courses that need to be built, packaged, and released over the next ninety to one hundred twenty days. In parallel, we are building out a content engine across YouTube, podcast, and short-form channels, with distribution across LinkedIn,
, and Instagram.



The inputs will not arrive as polished deliverables. You will be working from outlines, recorded sessions, fragmented ideas, and ongoing discussions. Part of the role is helping shape those inputs into something usable before production even begins.



On the course side, this starts with taking outlines and converting them into simple, functional slide decks that guide recording. These are not design projects. They are working tools that bring structure and clarity to the material. Templates and direction exist, but execution matters.



From there, you will take recorded material and build complete courses inside GoHighLevel. That includes structuring modules and lessons, tightening content, filling gaps where necessary, and ensuring that the customer experience works cleanly from purchase through delivery.



On the content side, you will take long-form material and develop it into YouTube videos, short-form clips, and podcast episodes. This includes editing, packaging, and understanding how content is positioned. Titles, thumbnails, captions, and release cadence are part of the work, not an afterthought. In your response, include the name of your favorite podcast and why.



Distribution is part of the role. Content needs to be adapted and deployed across LinkedIn,
, and Instagram in a way that fits each platform rather than simply being reposted.



This position requires judgment. There is direction and there are priorities, but there is no step-by-step instruction set. You are expected to make decisions, move work forward, and resolve gaps without waiting to be told what to do next.



The right person has already built courses, worked inside GoHighLevel beyond a basic level, and understands how funnels, workflows, and delivery systems connect. They are comfortable editing video, creating simple slide decks, and using AI tools to accelerate production. They can take unstructured material and turn it into something coherent, usable, and ready to ship.



This role is outcome-driven. If content does not get produced and released, the system is not working.



The hiring process begins with a live project inside an active account. This is not a hypothetical exercise.



If you are interested, submit a brief description of something you have built. Focus on structure, decisions made, and how you handled problems during execution.

title: Full Stack Developer (React + Supabase) to Build Client Portal & Document Engine
description:
Experience Level: Intermediate to Senior



Project Overview



We are looking for a skilled developer to build a "Headless-Hybrid" client intake system. We have an existing WordPress/WooCommerce site handling sales and user accounts.



Your job is to build a secure, modern React application that acts as the "Intake Engine," bridging our WordPress users with a high-performance Supabase database and an automated PDF generation workflow.



The Architecture:

 * Auth: "Trusted Handshake." WordPress generates a signed JWT; Supabase validates it.

 * Frontend: React (Vite) + React Hook Form for complex multi-step wizards.

 * Backend: Supabase (PostgreSQL) for data storage + Row Level Security (RLS).

 * Automation: n8n + docxtemplater for generating PDF reports from intake data.



Scope of Work

You will be responsible for executing the following phases:



 * The Bridge (Auth):

   * Write a PHP function in WordPress to generate a Supabase-compatible JWT using firebase/php-jwt.

   * Configure Supabase RLS policies to authenticate these tokens and restrict access to auth.uid().

 * The Frontend (Intake App):

   * Build a responsive React app (embedded or subdomain) using shadcn/ui.

   * Implement React Hook Form + Zod for a multi-step intake wizard with heavy conditional logic (branching based on user answers).

   * Ensure "Draft Mode" functionality (auto-save to Supabase without validation; validate only on final submit).



 * The Document Engine:

   * Connect n8n to Supabase webhooks/triggers.

   * Set up a workflow that pulls intake data, runs it through docxtemplater, converts it to PDF, and uploads it back to Supabase Storage.



 * The Dashboard:

   * Create a simple "My Documents" view where users can see their history and download generated PDFs.



Required Tech Stack

 * Frontend: React, TypeScript, Vite, React Hook Form, Zod, shadcn/ui (Tailwind).

 * Backend: Supabase (PostgreSQL, RLS, Edge Functions).

 * CMS Integration: WordPress (PHP) – specifically working with JWTs and custom hooks.

 * Automation: n8n (or similar low-code experience).



Ideal Candidate Profile

 * The "Logic" Expert: You understand that complex forms aren't just UI; they are state machines. You know how to manage deep conditional logic without spaghetti code.



 * The "Security" Minded: You understand why we are using RLS and not just a generic API key. You know how to safely pass tokens from a PHP backend to a JS frontend.



 * The "Automator": You have experience (or strong interest) in programmatic document generation (converting JSON data to Word/PDF templates).



Must be English proficient in writing. Comfortable communicating through WhatsApp and using time doctor online service to login each shift and have work supervised. You will not be able to work on other assignments or tasks for others during work hours. You will be expected to dedicate full time hours to this project. 



Weekly payment on Fridays via Western Union to your bank account, Maya or any other service or account that Western Union pays.



To Apply

Please reply with:



 * A brief summary of your experience with React Hook Form and Supabase.



 * In 1-2 sentences, explain how you would ensure that User A cannot read User B's intake form when both are stored in the same Supabase table. Users who apply without a answering this question will be ignored.

description:
Role Overview

Our Florida-based family law firm is seeking a detail-oriented Virtual Paralegal/Assistant to support our practice in matters involving adoptions, divorces, and paternity cases. This role is primarily focused on high-level document production, organization, and administrative support.



Key Responsibilities

Case Management: Downloading PDF files from public dockets and organizing digital client folders.



Legal Research: Conducting targeted research as directed.



Communication: Professional correspondence via
 and WhatsApp (chat and voice).



Requirements & Details



Schedule: Full-time or part-time schedules can be accommodated for the right candidate. You must be available to work within Florida Eastern Time, 9:00 AM – 5:00 PM ET.



Worldwide Standard Equivalents: 13:00 – 21:00 UTC (during US Daylight Saving Time) or 14:00 – 22:00 UTC (during US Standard Time).



Philippines Time (PHT, UTC+8): The Philippines observes a single time zone. These hours correspond to an overnight shift of 9:00 PM – 5:00 AM or 10:00 PM – 6:00 AM PHT, depending on the time of year.



Compensation: Weekly payments via Western Union to an account of your choice. We offer daily payouts for your first week while we mutually determine if the role is a good fit.



Technical: Reliable high-speed internet with a designated backup.



Work Environment: Willingness to work in a supervised environment using monitoring and time-tracking software (such as Time Doctor) due to the highly sensitive nature of our family law practice. We provide full access and training for this software; prior proficiency is not required.



Skills: Exceptional written and spoken English; proficiency in Microsoft Word.



Experience: Previous experience in a legal environment is preferred and would be helpful.

title: Bookkeeper (Virtual/Remote)
description:
Company Overview 



BE SmartAdmin Services Pty Ltd (BESAS) is an Australia-based provider of bespoke administrative support services, delivering highly skilled virtual assistants from the Philippines to clients across various industries in Australia. We specialise in administrative, operational, and bookkeeping solutions that help businesses streamline processes, improve efficiency, and achieve sustainable growth. 



For this role, you will be assigned to one of our Australian clients while also supporting BESAS with occasional ad hoc tasks as needed. The client operates multiple business entities and requires accurate, timely, and compliant financial reporting to support strategic decision-making and ensure smooth financial operations. 



Role Overview 



We are seeking a detail-oriented and highly organised Bookkeeper to manage day-to-day financial operations. This role is hands-on and task-driven, focusing on accuracy, compliance, and timely reporting across multiple entities. 



You will work closely with the finance team and follow established Standard Operating Procedures (SOPs) to ensure consistent and high-quality bookkeeping. 



Key Responsibilities 



• Prepare weekly cash flow reports, tracking inflows, outflows, and intercompany transactions, and flag any discrepancies or unusual movements.  

• Record, monitor, and reconcile intercompany loans, ensuring complete and accurate documentation.  

• Post approved journal entries and ensure proper coding, accuracy, and compliance with GST/VAT regulations.  

• Review invoices and financial records for GST correctness and ensure compliance with applicable tax requirements.  

• Generate and maintain Accounts Payable (AP) and Accounts Receivable (AR) reports to support management decision-making.  

• Enter and maintain accurate financial transactions in the accounting system to support reconciliation and reporting.  

• Follow established SOPs to ensure consistency, accuracy, and efficiency in all bookkeeping processes.  

 

Tools & Platforms 



• Accounting Software: Xero, MYOB  

• Communication & Collaboration: Gmail, Microsoft 365  

• Time Tracking: Clockify

  

Qualifications 



• Minimum 3–5 years of experience in bookkeeping or finance administration (remote/home-based experience preferred).  

• At least 1 year of experience with Australian bookkeeping or accounting standards.  

• Strong proficiency in Xero and MYOB.  

• Excellent attention to detail and accuracy in financial reporting.  

• Strong written and verbal English communication skills.  

• Highly organised with the ability to meet deadlines consistently.  

• Familiarity with Google Workspace or Microsoft 365 tools.  

• Experience with multi-entity bookkeeping is an advantage.  



Home Office Requirements 



• Stable internet connection (minimum 10 Mbps).  

• Computer/laptop with at least 8GB RAM and Microsoft Office installed.  

• Dual monitor setup is strongly preferred for efficiency and accuracy.  

• A quiet, professional, and distraction-free workspace.  

 

Working Hours 



• Monday to Friday  

• 7:00 AM – 3:30 PM (Philippine Standard Time)  

• 30-minute unpaid lunch break  

• Short tea breaks (up to 15 minutes, maximum of 2 per day) subject to supervisor approval  

• Use Clockify to accurately log working hours and tasks  

 

Compensation & Benefits 



• Premium rate: PhP 400/hour (billable work)  

• Base rate: PhP 200/hour (non-billable work, breaks, idle time)  

• Estimated monthly salary (based on 80% billable time, 40-hour work week): approx. PhP 62,400.  

• Salary paid in Philippine Pesos (Security Bank account required)  

• Independent contractor arrangement  

• Voluntary government contributions (SSS, PhilHealth, Pag-IBIG)  

• Salary review after successful completion of a 6-month probationary period  



Why Join BESAS? 



Join a company that values accuracy, compliance, and operational excellence. At BESAS, you will play a key role in supporting diverse Australian businesses while working in a professional, growth-oriented environment. 

How to Apply 



If you are detail-oriented, highly organised, and passionate about accurate financial management, we’d love to hear from you. 



Please send your CV to

title: Business Analyst (Project Based)
description:
Brisbane Australia based development company C9 - 
 is expanding rapidly and require a Scrum Business Analyst to join the team in a fulltime capacity.



Even if you have applied to other similar positions with us, if you meet the requirements we encourage you to make yourself known again to ensure you are still interested and your circumstances have not changed.



We are looking for a dedicated business analyst to be the point person in our software development scrum team.

The BA will be responsible for defining the software product vision and managing the software development process.

You should also be able to lead the product development team toward achieving the vision and mission of the organization.





Responsibilities:

- Take the lead of scrum teams 

- Providing vision and direction to the Agile development team and stakeholders throughout the project and create requirements

- Ensure that the team always has an adequate amount of prior prepared tasks to work on

- Define product vision, road-map and growth opportunities

- Assess value, write/develop user stories, epics and themes to ensure work focuses on those with maximum value that are aligned with product strategy.

- As needed, do project scoping and write software requirements specification documents and any other documents like wireframes, mockups etc. to aid in understanding the project requirements

- Provide backlog management, iteration planning, and elaboration of the user stories

- Lead the planning product release plans and set the expectation for delivery of new functionalities

- Provide an active role in mitigating impediments impacting successful team completion of Release/Sprint Goals

- Research and analyze market, the users, and the roadmap for the product

- Follow competitors and the clients related industry

- Keep abreast with Agile/Scrum best practices and new trends



Requirements:

- Bachelors degree in computer science, information technology, or a relevant field preferred.

- Previous working experience of at least 4 years

- In-depth knowledge of Agile methodologies.

- Strong analytical and problem-solving skills.

- Strong communication skills, written and verbal.

- Strong presentation skills.

- Ability to multi-task and work under pressure.





If you believe you have the right skills and attitude to work in our fast paced team working across multiple projects then please submit your CV and cover letter through Online Jobs.





Must be able to work Australian Timezone (8 - 18:00 AEST) and Holidays





A high level of speaking & written English are mandatory to apply.

title: AMAZING FUNNELBUILDER WANTED FOR 7-FIGURE ECOM BUSINESS
description:
Hey there,



My team and I are looking for a new tea
mber to join our amazing 7-figure eCommerce dropshipping business team.

Currently we are in need of someone that is responsible for the most important task  of this business, funnel building and landing page design.

It's essential that you are experienced with eCommerce/dropshipping and creating high-converting direct response funnels.

You will do your research on the web and create a perfect funnel blueprint together with the CEO and the Process Manager.



Please read the 4R model below for all the information that we expect, such as Role, Responsibilities, Results and Requirements. 



Department: Web Design & Funnel Department

Reports To: Process Manager / CEO



ROLE

Providing clean, fast, and high-converting product funnels on a daily basis. You are the person responsible for a very important part of the selling process. You ensure that the layout of the funnel is optimized for conversions, mobile-friendly, and that you can independently edit product photos to match the design perfectly.



RESPONSIBILITIES

Building and launching high-converting sales funnels using Funnelish.

Ensuring all pages load extremely fast and are perfectly optimized for mobile devices.

Knowing how to work with Photoshop or different edit programs to provide high quality product pictures and GIFs that are additional to the funnels. 

Integrating apps, payment gateways, and tracking pixels accurately.

Maintaining a certain benchmark that is created by the Process Manager. 



RESULTS

Being able to build 1-3 complete product funnels.

Making sure all the work is finished within a certain time frame. Thinking along with the CEO and Process Manager to create a perfect funnel flow concept and optimize Conversion Rates (CR) and Average Order Value (AOV). Improving yourself and the results everyday. 



REQUIREMENTS

- You speak & write English fluently. 

- You have experience with eCommerce and know what the requirements of a high-converting funnel are. 

- Being able to use different kind of systems & programs that are used for building funnels and adding pictures + GIFs. 

- You have an excellent eye for UX/UI design and marketing angles. 

- You’re in the possession of internet and a good phone/computer.

title: Social Media & Growth Manager (Kids Music Brand)
description:
Company Overview:

We are launching a fast-growing, values-driven children’s music brand focused on producing high-quality songs, videos, and content for kids and families. Our goal is to build a globally recognized brand that entertains, inspires, and connects with children in a meaningful way.



We are looking for a creative, data-driven Social Media & Growth Manager to take full ownership of our online presence and help scale our audience across platforms.





Role Overview:

This is not a basic posting role. We are looking for someone who can own and drive growth across all social platforms, combining content strategy, paid advertising, analytics, and platform optimization.



You will be responsible for turning our content into real traction—views, followers, subscribers, and listeners.





Key Responsibilities:



Content Strategy & Execution

 • Plan and execute a consistent posting schedule across YouTube, Instagram, TikTok, and other platforms

 • Collaborate with our production team to turn songs into high-performing social content (clips, reels, shorts, etc.)

 • Identify trends and adapt them into our brand voice (kids/family-friendly)



Growth & Audience Development

 • Build and grow followers, subscribers, and engagement across all platforms

 • Develop strategies to increase YouTube subscribers and Spotify listeners

 • Create and manage playlist strategies and content funnels



Paid Ads Management

 • Plan, launch, and optimize ad campaigns (Meta, YouTube, TikTok)

 • Run targeted campaigns to drive traffic to songs, playlists, and videos

 • Continuously test creatives, audiences, and messaging to improve ROI



Analytics & Optimization

 • Track performance across platforms (views, retention, CTR, conversions)

 • Use data to refine strategy and double down on what’s working

 • Provide regular reports with clear insights and next steps



Platform Optimization

 • Optimize titles, thumbnails, captions, and hashtags

 • Improve discoverability through SEO and algorithm strategies

 • Stay up to date with platform changes and best practices





Qualifications:

 • Proven experience growing social media accounts (especially YouTube, Instagram, or TikTok)

 • Strong understanding of content that performs (short-form + long-form)

 • Experience running and optimizing paid social campaigns

 • Data-driven mindset with ability to analyze and act on metrics

 • Creative thinker with strong instincts for viral / engaging content

 • Bonus: Experience in music, kids content, or family brands





What We’re Looking For:

 • Someone who takes ownership, not just executes tasks

 • Someone who understands that growth = content + distribution

 • Someone who is hungry to build something big from the ground up

 • Someone aligned with positive, family-friendly values

title: Recruitment Consultant
description:
Executive Recruitment Consultant (AUSTRALIAN PROPERTY & CONSTRUCTION) – Philippines-Based (Full-Cycle, Executive Level) 



Permanent Recruitment | Australia Market | No Cold BD | Supported by AI, Systems & Admin Assistant



Project role to start moving into PT or FT. 



Paul Group Recruitment is a well-established permanent recruitment agency in Australia, with a strong reputation for placing high-quality candidates across executive and senior-level roles. We are seeking a seasoned Executive Recruitment Consultant based in the Philippines to join our team and drive full-cycle recruitment delivery.



This is not a cold-calling role – you will step into a warm pipeline of leads and clients. You’ll be supported directly by a hands-on Director, strong automation systems & AI tools, and a dedicated VA Admin Assistant to streamline your process.



What You’ll Be Doing



Managing end-to-end executive recruitment: sourcing, screening, interviewing, shortlisting, presenting, and closing candidates.



Conducting phone and Microsoft Teams interviews with both clients and candidates – clear and confident spoken English is essential.



Partnering with warm leads – no cold BD, only genuine client opportunities.



Building strong client and candidate relationships with your excellent communication skills.



Leveraging Paul Group’s advanced AI platforms and recruitment systems to reduce admin and increase efficiency.



Collaborating closely with the Director for strategic placements and client support.



What We’re Looking For



5+ years’ proven experience in executive or senior-level recruitment (end-to-end). 



AUSTRALIAN EXPERIENCE ONLY 



PREFERABLY CONSTRUCTION AND PROPERTY OR SIMILAR 



Exceptional spoken and written English communication skills – polished, professional, and persuasive.



Strong understanding of permanent recruitment processes across multiple industries.



Comfortable conducting phone calls and video interviews (Teams) with senior-level clients and candidates.



Tech-savvy and confident working with AI-driven recruitment systems and automation.



Self-motivated, detail-oriented, and able to manage a recruitment cycle independently.



Based in the Philippines, with availability to align with Australian business hours.



What You’ll Get



Huge growth and promotion with salary increases. We give back to our preformers 



The chance to join a respected Australian recruitment brand with a strong market presence.



Access to AI, automation, and systems to make your job easier and more effective.



Dedicated VA Admin Assistant to handle process-heavy tasks, letting you focus on results.



Warm client leads provided – no need for cold business development.



Ongoing mentoring and support from a hands-on Director.



 If you are an experienced recruitment consultant ready to deliver high-quality executive placements with the support of cutting-edge tools and a strong leadership team – we’d love to hear from you.



Please create a Loom or video of some description with the below questions answered: 

Tell me about yourself?

What is your experience in recruitment? 

What sets you apart as a recruiter? 

Salary expectations and available when?



Only applicants with videos will be considered.

title: Full-Time Instagram DM Setter (Outbound)
description:
**Job Title:** Instagram DM Setter / Sales Closer, Photography Business (Full-Time)



**About the Role**



We are looking for a motivated, fluent English-speaking DM Setter to manage Instagram direct messages for a professional photography brand. Your job is simple: turn inquiries and warm leads into booked clients. This is a sales-focused role and we are looking for someone who knows how to close.



**Responsibilities**



- Respond to all inbound Instagram DM inquiries in a timely, professional manner

- Follow up with leads who have shown interest but have not yet booked

- Message warm leads (new followers coming from paid ads) to start conversations and move them toward booking

- Maintain a consistent, on-brand tone in all communications

- Keep track of leads and update on progress regularly



**Requirements**



- Fluent in written English, no grammatical errors, professional communication only

- Proven experience in sales, DM setting, or appointment setting

- Comfortable working independently with minimal supervision

- Reliable internet connection and available during scheduled hours

- Experience with Instagram preferred



**Hours**



Monday - Saturday, 10:00 AM to 6:00 PM EST



**Compensation**



- Base pay: $500 to $600/month based on experience

- Bonus: $10 per confirmed booking you convert



The bonus is uncapped. The more you close, the more you earn.

Please send the following:



1. A short introduction about yourself and your sales experience

2. An example of how you would respond to this inquiry: *"Hey, I saw your page and I'm interested in booking a shoot. How much do you charge?"*

3. Any past results you can share, leads converted, bookings made, etc.

title: B2B Account Manager (Customer Success)
description:
APPLY HERE: 

ED APPLICATIONS WILL NOT BE ACCEPTED



We are looking for a proactive and organised B2B Account Manager to join our growing team. While our standard Customer Service roles focus on reactive troubleshooting, this role is dedicated to the lifecycle of our 10,000+ school customers.



You will sit within the Customer Service team and assist with complex tickets, but your primary focus will be Customer Success: ensuring schools can pay easily, onboard their teachers effectively, and renew their subscriptions year after year.



With over 80,000 seats across 10,000 schools, you won't just be
ing individuals; you will be building workflows and using automation to communicate with our customers at scale, removing friction from their journey and maximizing the value they get from Wordwall.



KEY RESPONSIBILITIES

1. Proactive retention & renewal management

- Own the renewal process for school accounts

- Contact customers in advance of their contract end-dates to discuss renewal options and ensure retention

- Design and manage automated
 workflows to remind administrators about upcoming renewals

- Monitor usage data to identify "at-risk" schools (low usage) and intervene before they churn



2. Onboarding & adoption

- Engage with new school customers immediately after subscription to ensure they are set up correctly

- Drive adoption by ensuring purchased licenses are actually assigned to teachers

- Create resources or templates that help school administrators understand how to get the most out of the platform



3. Financial administration & friction removal

- Act as the bridge between the School and our Finance team to ensure smooth payment processing

- Investigate and resolve payment discrepancies, specifically matching bank payments to open invoices to prevent service interruption

- Assist schools with vendor forms, tax documents, and invoice queries to remove administrative barriers to purchase



4. Specialised customer support

-  Handle a portion of the general support queue, specifically focusing on tickets related to school plans, license management, and billing

- Serve as an escalation point for complex B2B queries from the wider support team



REQUIREMENTS

1. Essential:

- Experience: Minimum of 3 years’ experience in Customer Success, Account Management, or a B2B Customer Support role (SaaS experience preferred)

- Commercial mindset: Understanding of the customer lifecycle and the importance of churn reduction.

- Tech-savvy & process oriented: Comfortable working with data and CRM tools. You are capable of managing workflows for thousands of customers, not just one-off
s

- Financial literacy: Comfortable dealing with invoices, purchase orders, and basic reconciliation tasks

- Communication: Excellent written and spoken English (C1/C2 level) with the ability to negotiate and persuade, not just troubleshoot

- Remote work: Proven ability to work independently in a fully remote environment with a reliable Internet connection



2. Desirable:

-  Experience using support / CRM platforms (e.g. Zendesk, Intercom, HubSpot) to set up automated sequences or macros

- Experience in the EdTech sector or working with schools (understanding school budget cycles and procurement processes)

- Background in identifying upsell opportunities (e.g., noticing a school needs more seats and facilitating that growth)



MEASURING YOUR SUCCESS

- Renewal rate. The percentage of school clients who renew their contracts

- Churn reduction. Keeping school cancellations below a set target

- Onboarding success. The percentage of new schools that have active teachers within 30 days of purchase

- Administrative efficiency. Speed of resolving invoice/payment matching queries



BENEFITS

- 30 days' holiday per year

- 100% remote & flexible working #LI-Remote

- Social events and annual meet ups



OUR MISSION

Our mission at Wordwall is to simplify the lives of teachers by providing an easy-to-use platform for creating interactive games and worksheets. We automate the resource design process, allowing educators to focus on delivering engaging content. We are originally a UK-based company, but we have colleagues all across the world and work fully remotely.



APPLY HERE: 

ED APPLICATIONS WILL NOT BE ACCEPTED

description:
I’m looking for a dependable and organized Virtual Project Coordinator to help me manage our overnight installation projects.



This role is all about communication and coordination. You won’t be making big decisions — your main responsibility is to keep projects moving smoothly, support our field installers through group chats, and escalate issues when needed.



If you’re someone who’s calm under pressure, detail-oriented, and good at managing conversations, this might be a great fit for you.



What You’ll Be Doing:



Managing overnight projects via group chats with installers

Guiding the team using provided layouts, documents, and videos

Monitoring progress and flagging any issues right away

Escalating concerns to me or the client for approval

Providing updates when clients are included in chats

During slower times, posting previous project content on our social media

Helping set up ads for future posts (a plus if you have design/marketing experience)



What I’m Looking For:



Experience as a Project Coordinator, VA, or Operations Support

Strong written English communication

Organized and detail-focused

Comfortable juggling multiple conversations

Reliable and responsive

Willing to work US night hours (Day shift in PH) long-term



Schedule:



Full-time

US Night Shift (this is permanent)

First 1–3 months will follow US time strictly for training



I’m looking for someone who wants stability and long-term work. If that’s you, please send your resume and a short intro about your experience.



 me your updated resume at 
 with your intro voice recording via vocaroo use subject line: "POUR"



Excited to meet the right person!

title: Home Health Admin Assistant
description:
About the Role



M.D. Home Health, LLC, a Medicare/Medicaid-certified home health agency licensed by AHCA, is seeking a Remote Administrative Assistant with prior healthcare experience to support our Executive Director.



This position is ideal for someone who has worked in a medical office, home health agency, or insurance coordination setting and understands patient charting, authorizations, and plan of care management.



If you’ve ever completed, reviewed, or uploaded skilled nursing notes, Plans of Care (POCs), or therapy documents, this role will feel familiar.



Key Responsibilities



Review and manage open patient chart notes based on visit frequency and payer requirements.



Upload physician orders, labs, and skilled nursing documentation to the EMR (Netsmart Devero).



Notify the Executive Director immediately when critical lab results are received.



Maintain and update the Outlook scheduling calendar for visit frequency and recertifications.



Obtain authorizations through CareCentrix, WellSky, or payer portals in a timely manner.



Fax and track Plans of Care (POCs) and ensure signed documents are returned from physician offices.



Monitor and communicate recertification OASIS due dates with clinicians.



Maintain logs of authorizations, labs, and returned POCs for compliance tracking.



Protect all patient information in accordance with HIPAA and company policy.



Qualifications



Required Experience



1–2 years of home health, medical billing, or healthcare administrative experience.



Familiarity with EMRs such as Devero, WellSky, Alora, or similar systems.



Understanding of Plan of Care (POC) documentation, skilled nursing notes, or OASIS.



Proficiency in Microsoft Outlook, Excel, Word, and Teams.



Excellent written and verbal English communication.



Reliable internet and a quiet, professional workspace.



Preferred Experience



Prior work with CareCentrix, WellSky, or other insurance authorization portals.



Knowledge of CMS, Medicare, or Medicaid home health documentation standards.



Schedule & Compensation



Must be available during the hours of Monday–Friday, 9:00 AM–5:00 PM EST



Pay: $6.53 per hour



Long-term opportunity with a professional, U.S.-based home health agency



Paid training and performance-based growth after the 60-day evaluation period



How to Apply



 

 with the subject line:

Home Health Admin Assistant – [Your Full Name]



Include:



Your résumé (PDF)



A short cover letter describing your healthcare or home health admin experience



A Speedtest.net internet screenshot



Your available working hours (EST)



A brief answer to this question:

“Describe your experience with home health documentation such as POCs, OASIS, or skilled nursing notes.”

title: Virtual Assistant- Multi- Business Support
description:
We're seeking a detail-oriented, proactive, and adaptable Virtual Assistant to join our team and complement our existing VA, who has been a valuable asset for over two years. This role offers the unique opportunity to support the Owner across three diverse businesses: Logistics, a Medical Weight Loss practice, and a real estate portfolio. You'll play a vital role in streamlining operations and ensuring efficiency across all ventures.



Working remotely, you will analyze data, manage records, and develop efficient workflows. The ideal candidate is tech-savvy, proficient in learning multiple systems, highly organized, and self-motivated.



In this role, you will collaborate closely with our existing small VA team and support small to medium-sized teams across our Ohio-based businesses (EST time zone). While the position is remote and time zone flexible, availability for 1-2 scheduled meetings per month within the EST timezone is required.



Virtual Assistant Duties and Responsibilities:



Respond to Employees and tenants for service support requests

Perform monthly bank reconciliations and expense report analysis.

Utilize Google Sheets to analyze data, create pivot tables, and generate charts.

Accurately enter and analyze time-tracking data using [Specific Time Tracking Software, if applicable].

Maintain tenant records (payments, water bills) and send notifications via
.

Manage digital filing systems and organize documentation in Google Drive.

Real Estate: Assist with listing management and coordinate property showings.



What We Are Looking For:



Proficiency with Google Workspace (Docs, Sheets, Drive), Asana, Slack, and other relevant cloud-based tools. Experience with [Quickbooks or other relevant software] is a plus.

Excellent written and verbal communication skills.

Highly organized and able to multitask, quickly adapt to changing priorities, and manage multiple projects simultaneously.

Strong time management skills and the ability to work efficiently.

Self-directed and able to work independently with minimal supervision.

Ability to learn new software quickly.



What We Offer:



A flexible, remote work environment.

The opportunity to gain experience across diverse industries.

Collaborative team environment.

 (Gmail / Outlook)

Competitive hourly rate based on experience

(example: ?330 - ?655/hour - $9 - $18 AUD)

title: Meta Ads Creative & Campaign Assistant
description:

This role is ideal for someone who enjoys turning ideas into polished ad creatives, executing campaigns efficiently, and contributing to measurable growth.



Note: This is not an immediate start role. We are looking to bring someone on in the coming months.



Ad Creative Development

Create high-quality ad creatives (images, simple videos, carousels)

Produce multiple variations of ads based on provided ideas

Repurpose and iterate on existing high-performing creatives

Use tools such as Canva or similar



Ad Copywriting

Write clear, engaging ad copy tailored to parents of school-aged students

Adapt messaging across different formats and hooks

Generate multiple variations for testing



Campaign Management (Meta Ads)

Set up campaigns, ad sets, and ads in Meta Ads Manager

Duplicate and test variations efficiently

Make basic budget and performance adjustments based on guidelines



Performance Monitoring

Track key metrics (CTR, CPC, CPA)

Provide simple, structured performance updates

Highlight trends or areas for improvement



Requirements

1–3 years experience with Meta Ads 
/Instagram)

Strong attention to detail and ability to follow structured processes

Good written English for ad copy

Experience with Canva or similar design tools

Reliable, organised, and responsive



Bonus (Not Required)

Experience in education or tutoring-related products

Familiarity with direct response advertising

Basic video editing skills



Compensation

$5 USD/hour, with potential for growth based on performance and contribution

How to Apply



Please include:



Examples of ad creatives you have made (images or videos)

A brief description of your role in those campaigns

Your experience with Meta Ads Manager

Two short ad variations for the following product:



“Online course for Year 7–8 students preparing for selective school exams in Australia. Includes 40 structured lessons, 2,000+ questions, and full mock exams.”



About AcePoint



AcePoint Academy provides structured, high-quality preparation for selective school exams, combining detailed teaching with realistic exam practice. Our goal is to offer a smarter, more accessible alternative to traditional tutoring.
