title: Tech Automation & Systems Manager — Insurance Agency (Chicago, IL)
description:
**$9–$11/hour | Full-Time 40 hrs/week | Philippines Day Shift | 1099 Contractor**



---



**THE COMPANY**



Weer Insurance Group is an independent commercial insurance agency based in Chicago, IL. We serve contractors, trucking companies, restaurants, and businesses across the Chicagoland metro and Wisconsin markets — approximately 4,400 active clients. You will work directly with the CEO, not a manager at an outsourcing firm.



---



**THE SCHEDULE**



Monday–Friday, 8:00 AM – 5:00 PM Philippines Time (PHT / GMT+8)

This is a Philippines DAY SHIFT. You work normal waking hours — no graveyard shift.



Work style: Async-first. You work independently while the CEO sleeps and deliver documented results he reviews each morning. Weekly live video check-in required.



---



**IMPORTANT — READ BEFORE APPLYING**



This role requires exactly 40 hours per week tracked via Hubstaff with task-level logging. Hours are non-negotiable. If you are looking for flexible or part-time work, this is not the right fit.



Daily EOD summary required every day — completed work, blockers, and next day's plan with specific counts and dates. "In progress" is not an acceptable status update.



After any system change you made, you are responsible for verifying all connected systems still work before closing the task. Attention to detail is not optional in this role.



---



**OUR TECH STACK — YOU WILL WORK IN THESE SYSTEMS FROM DAY ONE**



Agency Management: EZLynx (AMS), AgencyZoom (CRM + pipeline automation)

Automation: Zapier, Cognito Forms, Webhooks

 & DNS: Microsoft 365, GoDaddy, SPF/DKIM/DMARC, SendGrid (EZLynx infrastructure), MXToolbox

Social Media: SocialPilot, Canva

Communication: Microsoft Teams, LightSpeed VOIP

Time Tracking: Hubstaff (mandatory)

Document Automation: Adapt (carrier notices + non-payment workflows)

APIs: EZLynx open API (custom integration work)

Other: Tarmika (Commercial Insurnace Rater), Chrome Extension development (queued project)



---



**WHAT YOU WILL OWN**



Your mission: The CEO spends zero time troubleshooting tech issues. Automations run flawlessly. Leads never get lost.



Automation & Systems (40%)

— Build, test, and monitor Zapier workflows connecting EZLynx, AgencyZoom, and Cognito Forms

— Migrate and document automation logic so it can be maintained by others

— Eliminate manual data entry bottlenecks

— Verify all connected systems still function after every change you make



Pipeline & CRM Management (25%)

— Build and activate AgencyZoom pipeline automations for Commercial Lines and Personal Lines

— Manage lead list scrubbing, segmentation, and pipeline loading

— Track lead counts, pipeline movement, and automation errors daily



 Deliverability & Campaigns (15%)

— Own SPF, DKIM, and DMARC configuration across all agency domains

— Monitor and optimize AgencyZoom
 sequences — report open rates on a consistent schedule

— A/B test subject lines; diagnose and fix deliverability failures



Social Media (15%)

— Schedule 2–3 posts per week via SocialPilot 
, LinkedIn, Instagram)

— Create graphics in Canva; maintain content calendar; track engagement monthly



Proactive Problem-Solving (5%)

— Spot inefficiencies and surface them with a proposed solution, not just a problem statement

— Flag blockers the same day they are discovered



---



**REQUIRED EXPERIENCE**



— 3+ years automation/CRM experience — Zapier, Make, or equivalent

— API integration and webhook experience — you can build custom connections, not just pre-built Zaps

—
 deliverability — you understand SPF/DKIM/DMARC and can diagnose why
s land in spam

— DNS management — you know what an A record, CNAME, and TXT record are and how they interact

— Strong written English — your daily summaries and client-facing automations must be professional

— Reliable infrastructure: 10+ Mbps internet, backup connection, UPS power backup



Preferred (not required):

— US insurance agency experience — EZLynx, AgencyZoom, AMS360, or Applied Epic

— Chrome Extension development

— GoHighLevel, HubSpot, or Salesforce automation experience



---



**COMPENSATION**



This is a 1099 independent contractor position. No benefits. Pay via Wise, bi-weekly.



Starting rate based on experience:

— Strong automation, no insurance experience: $9/hour ? $10 after 90 days ? $11 Year 1

— Automation + insurance agency experience: $10/hour ? $11 after 90 days ? $12 Year 1

— Senior expert + API/certifications: $11/hour ? $12 after 90 days ? $13 Year 1



Long-term path: $11–$13/hour Year 2–3 (automation team lead) | $13–$15/hour Year 4–5



Rate increases are tied to consistent 40-hour weeks, on-time deliverables, and measurable output — not tenure alone.



---



**HOW TO APPLY**



: 
 

Subject line: Tech Automation – [Your Name] – [Years Experience] – [Primary Platform]



Include all of the following:



1. PORTFOLIO (required)

3–5 automation workflows you have built. For each include: platform used, business problem solved, and measurable results (time saved, leads captured, error reduction).



2. ANSWER THESE 5 QUESTIONS



Q1: You update DNS records to fix an
 deliverability issue and the agency website goes down. What happened and what is your step-by-step recovery process?



Q2: An AgencyZoom
 sequence has a 3% open rate on
 1 and 0% on
s 2–5. Walk through your diagnosis and the first three changes you would make.



Q3: A Zapier workflow routing leads from a web form into a CRM stops firing. What are your first five troubleshooting steps?



Q4: The CEO asks you to automate follow-up for commercial prospects who haven't responded in 30 days. Describe the workflow you would build and how you would test it before activating on live leads.



Q5: Write a social media post for a commercial insurance agency targeting contractors in Illinois. Include post copy and a brief description of the Canva graphic you would pair with it.



3. ONE CASE STUDY (300–500 words)

Problem | Solution | Measurable Results



4. INFRASTRUCTURE CONFIRMATION

Internet speed and backup plan | Power backup (UPS or generator) | Available start date



5. TWO REFERENCES

Automation clients, managers, or direct collaborators



---



**INTERVIEW PROCESS (2–3 weeks)**



Step 1: Application review — portfolio and screening questions evaluated

Step 2: Technical interview (30 min) — live walkthrough of your portfolio

Step 3: Paid test project ($100, 8–10 hours) — real insurance automation scenario

Step 4: Reference check

Step 5: Offer



---



**WHAT MAKES A STRONG CANDIDATE**



— You can explain why an automation works, not just how to click through it

— You test everything connected to what you touched before you close a task

— You surface blockers the same day, not the next morning

— You measure your work in time saved and revenue impact, not features shipped

— You show up for 40 hours every week and your daily summaries prove it



---



Weer Insurance Group | Chicago, Illinois | 

Independent Contractor | We value automation expertise over insurance experience

title: Senior Financial Analyst
description:
Who is Bare?

Bare is one of Australia’s fastest growing businesses, in one of the most traditional industries in the world — the funeral industry.

We exist to make end-of-life care accessible, affordable and transparent, changing the way Australians deal with death. For too long, the industry has delivered expensive, traditional, cookie-cutter services that don’t reflect how modern Australians want to say goodbye.

By combining empathy with technology, we’re creating end-of-life experiences that are simple, personalised and affordable. In just five years, we’ve supported more than 40,000 families, become Australia’s most awarded end-of-life provider (recognised for customer service, innovation and digital disruption), and built a team of 100+ passionate people.

And we’re just getting started.

As part of our continued growth, we’re looking for a Senior Financial Analyst to join our finance team.



So, what’s the role?

-This is not your typical Senior Financial Analyst role. You’ll work closely with our VP Finance and senior leadership team, helping to drive financial insight and discipline across one of Australia’s fastest growing companies.

-You’ll play a key role in financial analysis, reporting, forecasting and business partnering, turning financial data into meaningful insights that support smart commercial decisions.

-This is a hands-on role in a fast-paced, high-growth environment, ideal for someone who enjoys digging into the numbers, improving processes, and influencing business decisions.



You’ll be responsible for:

-Preparing monthly financial reports, dashboards and P&L analysis, including clear variance commentary

-Supporting the budgeting and forecasting processes across multiple entities

-Building and maintaining financial models to support planning and decision-making

-Providing financial insights and analysis to support senior leadership and operational teams

-Partnering with State Leads and department heads to monitor performance and improve margins

-Assisting with reconciliations and financial data accuracy across systems

-Supporting compliance with BAS, PAYGW, FBT and other regulatory requirements

-Assisting with audit preparation and working with external auditors

-Identifying opportunities to improve financial processes and reporting efficiency

-Supporting the implementation of automation, AI tools and improved reporting frameworks



What will set you apart from other candidates:

-You’re analytical and commercially minded, able to turn data into meaningful insights

-You enjoy solving problems and improving processes

-You’re comfortable working in fast-paced, high-growth environments

-You’re highly organised and able to manage multiple priorities

-You take ownership and initiative, proactively identifying opportunities for improvement

-You’re curious and interested in leveraging technology and automation in finance



What you’ll bring:

-A Bachelor’s degree in Accounting, Finance or a related field

-CPA, CA or CMA qualification (or working towards) highly regarded

-4–6+ years’ experience in financial analysis, reporting or accounting

-Strong experience with financial reporting, forecasting and variance analysis

-Advanced Excel / financial modelling skills

-Experience with Xero or similar accounting systems

-Strong communication skills and the ability to present financial insights clearly to non-finance stakeholders



What’s in it for you?

This isn’t your ordinary finance role, in your ordinary company. You’ll join an entrepreneurial, inclusive culture where we succeed together. We offer autonomy, flexibility and real ownership. No two days are the same — and that’s exactly how we like it.



In addition, we offer:

-Strong opportunities for career growth and progression

-A high-performing and highly engaged team environment

-Autonomy and flexibility, including work-from-home options

-A competitive remuneration package

-The opportunity to help transform an industry and make a real human impact



The main reason you’ll join, however, is because you believe in what we’re building. You’re excited by growth. You want to help scale a business that is genuinely changing lives — and you want your finance expertise to be part of that journey.



Please include your resume in your application.

title: Remote Copywriter
description:
You must apply via the link to be considered for the role: 



WHO WE'RE LOOKING FOR



The ideal copywriter has excellent English writing skills and is excited to write high-quality, SEO-driven content that aligns with detailed, client-specific guidelines. Projects most commonly include writing web pages for eCommerce and lead generation business sites such as category pages, product descriptions, and blog posts. Our clientele is constantly evolving. We produce content for these and many other industry verticals:



    Fashion (both mass-market and luxury)

    Skincare & Beauty

    Tech & Software**

    Finance & Investing**

    Law (family law, product liability, divorce, etc.)**

    Education

    Home Improvement

    Automobiles & Motorcycles (OEM and aftermarket accessories)

    Health and Wellness**

    Medical / Clinical**

    Digital Marketing

    SEO / PR / Advertising / Marketing**



**Writers with a background in these highly specialized fields are strongly encouraged to apply.



The ideal candidate for this position is a multifaceted technical and creative writer with at least two to four years of professional, non-academic experience. Candidates should understand how to write content that effortlessly blends SEO best practices and brand priorities for finished work that’s engaging, creative, and ROI-driven. Candidates should also be willing and able to complete careful research in order to gain a strong understanding of various industries. Candidates should be prepared to provide portfolios featuring published work. Once an offer has been extended, writers will be asked to take a brief training course.



COMPENSATION:



Writers are paid on a per-word basis. The rate is assessed according to our KPI rubric (key performance indicators) with an automatic raise after 400 and 800 pages have gone live on our client's websites.



Initial compensation is up to $0.06 per word with $0.034 per word being the most typical compensation level. This is $30 or $17 per page of 500 words.



After 400 pages live, the top marginal rate increases to $0.064 per word with the most typical rate of $0.038 per word, or $32 and $19 per page. After 800 pages live, the top marginal rate increases to $0.07 per word with $0.044 per word being the most typical, or $35 and $22 per page.

title: Shopify Store Operations Specialist
description:
Shopify Store Operations Specialist

Location: Remote (Philippines-based)

Type: Full-Time

Level: Mid–Senior

Daily Rate: ?2,000 – ?2,500



About the Role

Hair Doctors is a fast-growing Australian haircare brand preparing to launch our e-commerce store. We are building our Shopify store now and we need a detail-oriented operations specialist to keep it running cleanly, accurately, and efficiently from day one.

This is not a marketing role. This is not a development role. This is the person who makes sure the store works — products are correct, orders are processed, the app stack is maintained, and the data is clean. If you take pride in operational excellence and you know Shopify inside out, this role is for you.

You will be the engine room of our store. The marketing team depends on you for clean product data. The CRM team depends on you for accurate customer and order data. The business depends on you for a store that runs without problems.



Core Accountabilities

Product & Catalogue Management



Upload and maintain all product listings — titles, descriptions, images, variants, pricing, and tags — across our two ranges and multiple SKUs

Build and manage collections, ensuring products are correctly categorised and displayed

Maintain metafields for dynamic content requirements

Keep product data accurate and consistent at all times — no outdated pricing, no broken images, no missing variants

Coordinate with the design and content team to ensure product content meets brand standards before going live



Order Management & Fulfilment



Process and manage orders from placement through to fulfilment

Handle order exceptions — refunds, cancellations, address corrections, and customer queries escalated from support

Monitor fulfilment status and flag delays or issues proactively

Manage B2B draft orders and wholesale customer accounts

Coordinate with fulfilment partners or logistics providers as required



App Stack & Store Health



Install, configure, and maintain third-party Shopify apps

Conduct regular audits of the app stack — identify redundancies, unused apps, and anything that may be slowing the store down

Monitor store health proactively — page speed, broken links, checkout errors, and pixel firing

Escalate technical issues that require developer intervention and follow through until resolved

Ensure all apps are correctly integrated and not conflicting with each other or the theme



Customer Data & Shopify CRM



Maintain Shopify customer records — tags, segments, purchase history, and custom properties

Ensure customer data is clean, correctly tagged, and accurately reflects purchase behaviour

Support the Klaviyo CRM specialist by ensuring Shopify events are firing correctly and customer data is structured consistently

Set up and manage customer account settings and B2B company profiles



Promotions & Merchandising



Set up and manage discount codes, promotional offers, and gift card programmes

Configure automatic discounts and ensure they are correctly scoped and tested before going live

Support product launches by ensuring new products are correctly listed, linked, and visible at the right time

Assist with basic visual merchandising — product ordering within collections, featured products, and homepage content updates



Reporting



Provide weekly operational reporting covering store performance, order volumes, and any issues identified

Monitor Shopify analytics and flag anything unusual — traffic drops, conversion dips, checkout abandonment spikes

Track inventory levels and alert the team to low stock before it becomes a problem





Who You Are



Has managed a Shopify store day-to-day for a DTC or eCommerce brand — not just set one up, but run one operationally for a sustained period

Genuinely detail-oriented — you notice when a product image is wrong, a price is outdated, or a tag is missing

Proactive — you flag problems before they are pointed out to you

Comfortable working independently and managing your own priorities without constant direction

Strong written English — you will be communicating with an Australian team across different time zones, primarily async

3–5 years of hands-on Shopify experience at a mid-to-senior operational level

Experience working with foreign clients, preferably Australian, US, or UK





Platform Skills (Non-Negotiable)

Shopify Admin



Fully proficient in Shopify admin — products, collections, orders, customers, discounts, apps, and analytics

Understands Shopify metafields and how to use them for dynamic content

Can manage theme customisations using the Theme Editor without developer support

Understands Shopify's customer segmentation and tagging system

Familiar with Shopify markets and multi-currency settings



Shopify Events & Tracking



Understands how Shopify events work — viewed product, added to cart, started checkout, placed order, fulfilled order

Can validate that pixels and tracking scripts are firing correctly

Can identify when events are misfiring and escalate with the right information for a developer to fix



App Ecosystem



Experience managing a multi-app Shopify stack

Familiarity with common DTC app categories — reviews, upsell, loyalty, subscription, wholesale, page builder

Can assess whether an app is causing performance issues and recommend alternatives



Reporting & Analytics



Can navigate Shopify analytics and reports confidently

Understands key ecommerce metrics — conversion rate, AOV, returning customer rate, cart abandonment





Bonus (Not Required)



Experience with PageFly or similar Shopify page builders

Experience with wholesale or B2B order management

Familiarity with Klaviyo or Omnisend and how Shopify data feeds into them

Experience with inventory management apps





How to Apply

Applications without demonstrated hands-on Shopify operations experience will not be progressed.

Please include:



A specific example of a Shopify store you have managed operationally — what you were responsible for, how many SKUs, and what the day-to-day looked like

How you have handled a store problem or error that you identified proactively — what it was, how you found it, and what you did

The Shopify apps you have the most experience with and what you used them for

Your desired daily rate in PHP and your availability

title: Social Media + Online Presence/SEO/AI SEO Expert for Real Estate Brand
description:
I am looking to hire a highly skilled Online Presence / Social Media Expert to help build and manage a strong digital presence for my real estate brand.



This role is for someone who is an expert in social media first and foremost, but who is also very comfortable with tech, AI tools, websites, and digital branding. Real estate experience is a plus, but it is not required. What matters most is that you understand how to build, organize, grow, and manage a strong online presence across the most important platforms.



I want someone who can help me build out and strengthen my presence on platforms such as:



LinkedIn

Realtor dot com

Zillow

Homes dot com

Google Business Profile


Instagram

TikTok

YouTube



I also want to build a strong blogging strategy and improve my overall digital footprint so that my brand is more visible online. A bonus would be someone who understands how to improve visibility for AI-generated answers / AI search results as well.



Content creation itself can be outsourced, but I want this person to help manage the strategy, organization, posting flow, platform optimization, and overall execution.



What I’m Looking For:



Expert in social media strategy and platform management

Very tech-savvy and highly organized

Comfortable using AI tools to improve workflows and productivity

Able to help with website-related tasks

Familiar with GitHub or comfortable learning / using it

Strong understanding of branding and online visibility

Able to optimize business profiles and social platforms properly

Strong written English and communication skills

Proactive, dependable, and detail-oriented



Nice to Have:



Experience working with real estate agents, brokers, or real estate brands

Experience setting up and optimizing profiles on real estate websites

Knowledge of SEO, local SEO, blogging strategy, and content planning

Understanding of how businesses can appear more often in AI answers / AI search experiences

Experience coordinating outsourced content creators, editors, or designers



Main Responsibilities:



Build and strengthen my online presence across all major platforms

Help create a strategy for my personal brand and real estate brand

Set up, optimize, and improve profiles and pages across key websites

Help manage social media accounts and posting systems

Coordinate content workflow and content publishing

Support blog planning and content organization

Assist with website-related updates and improvements

Use AI tools to improve speed, quality, and efficiency

Recommend ideas to increase visibility, credibility, and reach online



Who This Job Is Best For:



This is a great role for someone who loves digital branding, social media, tech tools, AI, and helping build a strong online presence for a business owner. If you are the kind of person who knows how to make a brand look polished, active, credible, and visible online, this could be a great fit.



Compensation depends on experience, skill level, and technical ability. 



To Apply, Please send me:

Your experience with social media and online presence management

Any experience you have with real estate brands, if any

The platforms you are strongest at

Any experience with websites, GitHub, blogging, SEO, or AI tools

title: Trailer Management Assistant
description:
GH Logistics is a high performance freight brokerage and asset based logistics company specializing in dry van and refrigerated freight. We move quickly, but we move with structure. Our operation is built on real-time visibility, disciplined execution, and clear communication. We take pride in keeping freight organized, assets accounted for, and operations running cleanly from pickup to delivery.



If you’re someone who enjoys structured execution, asset visibility, and maintaining operational accuracy behind the scenes, you’ll feel right at home here.



Role Overview

You support the Trailer Manager in overseeing a fleet of 250+ trailers across multiple carriers and terminals. You play a critical role in ensuring every trailer is accounted for, properly assigned, compliant, and operational. This role is built for someone who thrives on organization, precision, and maintaining consistency across a fast-moving logistics environment.



What You’ll Be Doing

• Monitor, update, and reconcile trailer locations across the network on a daily basis

• Coordinate with dispatchers, drivers, and terminals to ensure accurate trailer assignments and timely movement

• Track trailer availability, maintenance schedules, and repair status

• Maintain accurate and up-to-date trailer documentation (registrations, inspections, tags, insurance)

• Support reporting on trailer utilization, downtime, and compliance

• Identify discrepancies, missing updates, or unreported trailer statuses and escalate promptly

• Assist in improving internal trailer tracking systems for better visibility and accuracy

• Execute processes consistently with strong attention to detail

• Collaborate cross-functionally with dispatch, compliance, and maintenance teams



What Success Looks Like

• Trailer locations and statuses are consistently accurate and fully reconciled

• Assignments, availability, and movements are properly documented and updated in real time

• Maintenance and compliance records are complete and up to date

• Discrepancies are identified early and resolved before impacting operations

• Reporting on utilization and downtime is clean, accurate, and actionable

• Communication across departments is clear, timely, and structured



Who We’re Looking For

• Experience in fleet management, logistics coordination, dispatch, or similar operational roles (preferred)

• Strong attention to detail with high accuracy in tracking and record-keeping

• Organized and capable of managing multiple data points across systems and teams

• Clear and professional communication skills across departments

• Familiarity with platforms such as Samsara, LoadStop, or similar tracking systems (a plus)

• Proactive mindset, able to identify and address issues before they escalate

• Strong analytical and problem-solving skills in a fast-paced environment

• Minimum 45 WPM typing speed

• Proficient in Microsoft Office and Google Workspace

• Reliable internet connection and fully equipped remote work setup

• Team oriented, coachable, and aligned with structured processes



Why Join GH Logistics?

• Structured systems and clear operational expectations

• Hands on leadership with direct feedback

• Defined KPIs and measurable performance growth

• Opportunity to grow within a scaling logistics operation

• Collaborative, team oriented environment

• Recognition based on performance and contribution

• Permanent work from home setup

• Paid training upon successful onboarding



Schedule & Work Setup

• Full-Time Remote Role | Direct Hire to a U.S. Company

title: Graphic Designer
description:
Graphic Designer (Part-Time to Full-Time)



Location: Remote, Dallas, TX-based team

Schedule: 9 AM – 5 PM CST

Company: LevelUp Digital



Please send your portfolio and design examples with your application. 



About LevelUp Digital



LevelUp Digital is a HubSpot Platinum Partner and a full-service, MarTech-focused digital agency.



We don’t just run marketing campaigns, we build the systems behind them. Our work spans digital marketing, CRM architecture, automation, and full-scale web and application development. From ad campaigns to complex backend integrations, everything we do is designed to help businesses scale with clarity and efficiency.



We built this company because we saw too many agencies overpromise, overstaff, and underdeliver. That’s not how we operate.



Our team acts as an extension of our clients’ businesses, combining strategy, execution, and technical expertise. We’re made up of experienced marketers, developers, and creatives across the U.S. and globally, all working together in a flexible, no-ego environment.



We move fast, we care about the work, and we expect the same from anyone who joins us.



The Role



We’re looking for a Graphic Designer who can do more than just make things look good, you need to understand why something works.



This role will start as part-time to ensure the right fit on both sides. If things click, it will move into a full-time position.



You’ll be working across a wide range of projects, including digital marketing assets, brand design, and web/landing page design. This is a hands-on role where you’ll collaborate closely with marketing strategists and developers to bring campaigns to life.



What You’ll Be Doing

Designing digital assets for marketing campaigns, including ads, social media graphics, and
 visuals

Creating and maintaining brand identities across multiple clients

Designing landing pages and website pages with a focus on conversion and user experience

Collaborating with marketing and development teams to execute campaigns

Creating print materials such as brochures, flyers, and other collateral when needed

Taking feedback and iterating quickly without ego

Managing multiple projects and deadlines in a fast-paced environment

What We’re Looking For

Strong experience in graphic design and brand design

Experience with digital marketing design (ads, social,
, etc.)

Ability to design landing pages and website layouts with conversion in mind

Understanding of user experience and layout structure, not just visuals

Proficiency in standard design tools (Adobe Creative Suite, Figma, etc.)

HubSpot experience is a plus, but not required

Strong attention to detail and ability to follow brand guidelines

Excellent communication skills and fluency in English

Work Style & Expectations

Available 9 AM – 5 PM CST for collaboration

Able to work independently while staying aligned with the team

Open to feedback and willing to refine work quickly

Serious about the role and committed to growing with the team



We’re looking for someone who wants to be part of something long-term. This is not a fit for someone juggling multiple roles without transparency or commitment.



Why Join LevelUp

Flexible, remote-first environment

A collaborative team that actually supports each other

Exposure to a wide range of industries and projects

Opportunity to grow into a full-time, long-term role

Work that actually impacts real businesses, not just “pretty designs”

About LevelUp Digital



LevelUp Digital is a HubSpot Platinum Partner and a full-service, MarTech-focused digital agency.



We don’t just design websites, we build the systems behind them. Our work spans digital marketing, CRM architecture, automation, and full-scale web and application development. From landing pages to complex integrations, everything we create is designed to perform, convert, and scale.

Work Style & Expectations

Available 9 AM – 5 PM CST for collaboration

Able to manage projects independently and meet deadlines

Open to feedback and able to iterate quickly

Focused, reliable, and serious about long-term growth with the team



This is not a fit for someone looking to casually freelance or split attention across multiple roles without transparency.



Why Join LevelUp

Flexible, remote-first environment

A highly collaborative team across marketing and development

Exposure to a wide range of industries and projects

Opportunity to grow into a full-time role

Work that directly impacts client growth and performance

title: WordPress / Divi VA Needed — Divi-First Developer
description:
Divi 4 required, Divi 5 a strong plus



I’m looking for a WordPress VA / web developer who is genuinely strong in Divi and can help build, update, improve, and maintain websites across multiple brands and client projects.



My main need right now is WordPress + Divi, especially on sites that may also use WooCommerce. I’m also moving older sites into Divi 5 and starting new projects in Divi 5, so I need someone who truly understands Divi and works efficiently inside it.



Important



I use Divi as my main builder.



Because of that, I am not looking for someone whose main experience is Elementor and who only occasionally works in Divi. Elementor may be great, but this role is for someone who is truly Divi-first.



If your portfolio mainly shows Elementor sites and Divi is secondary, this is probably not the right fit.



What I need help with



I’m looking for someone who can:



build pages and full websites in WordPress + Divi

work on Divi + WooCommerce sites

improve existing websites

follow an existing design system using:

variables

presets

clean layout structure

responsive design best practices

make updates, tweaks, page builds, and ongoing edits

work cleanly inside the builder without creating a mess behind the scenes

help with ongoing client site support

communicate clearly when working on client-related requests

possibly assist with support or ticket-based workflows when needed



If the fit is good, this can become an ongoing long-term role.



Must-have experience



To apply, you must have:



strong hands-on experience with WordPress

strong hands-on experience with Divi

real Divi 4 experience

ability to show live websites you personally built using Divi

experience with WooCommerce

strong understanding of:

mobile responsiveness

spacing and typography

clean page structure

basic SEO best practices

site speed / performance basics

conversion-focused layouts

strong communication and attention to detail

Strong bonus experience



These are not required, but are a big plus:



experience with Divi 5

ability to show sites built in Divi 5

experience with Shopify

experience connecting stores to
, Instagram, and TikTok shops

experience with Rank Math

experience with WP All Import

experience with WPForms

experience with Google Drive integrations

experience working inside cPanel

experience with Go High Level

experience with WHMCS

experience handling client requests through a support or ticket system

ability to help with simple graphics or web-ready visual assets

What I do not want



Please do not apply if:



Elementor is your main builder and Divi is secondary

you cannot show real Divi-built examples

you rely heavily on custom code for things that should be built natively in Divi

you build slowly on standard page tasks

your builder structure is messy, overcomplicated, or inconsistent

How I like websites built



I want websites built with:



clean, modern design

strong mobile responsiveness

clear layout hierarchy

good user experience

good basic SEO setup

consistency across the site

efficient, organized builder structure



If you work in Divi, I want someone who knows how to build cleanly and efficiently, not just someone who can make a page look finished on the front end.



Divi-specific note



I’m especially interested in someone who:



has real experience building in Divi 4

understands how Divi projects should be structured

is comfortable moving into or already working in Divi 5

can show actual examples of Divi work, not just say they know it



If you already have real Divi 5 experience, that is a major plus.



Type of work involved



Projects may include:



standard content pages

marketing pages

WooCommerce product, category, and store pages

landing pages

support/help pages

ongoing edits for my brands

client site updates and maintenance



Some work may also include:



social commerce linking

plugin-based workflows

SEO setup

forms/imports/integrations

client communication-related tasks

End your reply to me by saying Divi-First so i know you saw this. 

support or ticket-based follow-up



To apply, please send all of the following



1. Divi examples



Send 3–5 live websites you personally built using Divi.



For each site, tell me:



whether it was built in Divi 4 or Divi 5

what parts you personally handled

whether it included WooCommerce

whether you handled mobile optimization, SEO setup, or performance improvements



2. Your Divi experience



Tell me:



how long you have been working with Divi

how much real experience you have with Divi 4

whether you have worked in Divi 5

whether you can show any real Divi 5 examples



3. Your WordPress / WooCommerce experience



Tell me your experience with:



WordPress

WooCommerce

Rank Math

WP All Import

WPForms

Google Drive integrations

cPanel

 / Instagram / TikTok shop linking

Go High Level

WHMCS

Shopify

client support or ticket systems



4. Your speed



Please tell me, on average, how long it takes you to complete:



a simple content/info page in Divi

a more polished marketing page in Divi

a WooCommerce-related or more involved page



Also tell me:



how you estimate time before starting

how you keep page builds efficient and on track



5. Your availability



Please include:



your hourly rate

how many hours per week you are available

your time zone

Important application instruction



Start your application with:



Divi-first developer



That helps me know you actually read the full post.



Final note



I’m looking for someone who understands the difference between:



just knowing WordPress

and being truly efficient in Divi



If you are organized, responsive, efficient, and can show real Divi work, I’d love to hear from you.

title: Appointment setter/closer/trial activation
description:
Title: Trial Activation Specialist (US Market, SaaS Automotive)



Apply via Google form





We’re hiring a full-time Trial Activation Specialist to intercept new trial users in the first minutes after signup, diagnose their setup, improve their configuration, and qualify serious operators for a founder call.



This is not a traditional sales role.

This is not appointment setting.

This is not customer support.



APPLICATION VIA GOOGLE FORM BELOW!



Your job is to:



Contact new trial users immediately after signup



Understand how they currently source vehicles



Diagnose whether their Swoopa setup is correctly configured



Apply one or two tactical improvements live on the call



Identify serious operators vs casual testers



Book qualified operators into a follow-up call with the founder



Follow structured scripts and qualification criteria



Keep clean notes and tagging in the CRM



Participate in call reviews and process improvement





You are not expected to hard-close.

You are expected to think clearly, guide confidently, and qualify accurately. 





---



What You’ll Do



Call new trial users within minutes of signup



Ask structured diagnostic questions about their sourcing workflow



Guide users through quick setup improvements



Recognize high-intent operators using defined criteria



Book qualified users into a founder strategy call



Send brief SMS/email follow-ups when required



Log outcomes cleanly and consistently



Follow and improve scripts based on performance data







---



Requirements



Fluent or near-native American accent



Experience speaking with US customers



Prior SDR, appointment-setting, or closing experience (minimum 1–2 years)



Able to follow structured scripts without freelancing the pitch



Comfortable guiding users through simple technical steps



Calm, clear, non-pushy phone presence



Strong written English for short follow-ups



Reliable internet, quiet workspace, proper headset (important)



Able to work US business hours



Full-time, long-term availability





MALE ONLY applicants ? we are working in a male dominant niche. 





---



Performance Metrics



% of new trials contacted within 5 minutes of search creation. 



% of contacted users receiving a setup improvement



% of qualified operators booked to founder call



Downstream paid conversion rate of booked users





Bonuses are paid on qualified bookings and downstream conversions, not raw call volume.





---



Compensation



Base Salary: $1,500 USD / month



Performance Bonuses:



Bonus per qualified operator booking



Bonus per converted operator after founder call



Additional win-back bonus for reactivated past subscribers





Expected Earnings:



Solid performer: $1800–$2500/month



High performer: $2500–$3000/month







---



Application



Applications must be submitted via the form.

description:

• Send appointment notices and follow-up
s to attorneys and clients.

• Manage and respond to
s promptly and professionally.

• Handle reschedules, cancellations, and no-show follow-ups with authority and professionalism.

s, and schedules.

title: STABLE DIFFUSION - LORA

We are building a fast-growing digital brand focused on high-quality visual content (social media, carousels, and creative assets). We are looking for a skilled **AI Image Specialist** who can leverage tools like Stable Diffusion to create clean, visually appealing, and consistent designs.

---



### What We Offer



* Long-term opportunity

* Flexible schedule

* Consistent work flow

* Opportunity to grow with a fast-scaling brand



---



### How to Apply

1. Portfolio (AI-generated images preferred)

2. Tools you use (Stable Diffusion setup, LoRA experience, etc.)

3. Short explanation of your workflow

4. Your hourly rate



---



We are looking for someone reliable, creative, and detail-oriented who understands modern AI workflows and can produce clean, high-quality visuals consistently.

What You’ll Gain



- Full-time stable income

- Monday to Friday schedule

- Flexible hours (one daily meeting required)

- No graveyard shifts

- Reliable payments via Wise every two weeks.

- Performance bonuses

- Clear path to increase your income

- All tools provided

- If you perform well, your income grows.



What You’ll Do



- Manage 40–50 clients

- Run onboarding calls (script provided)

- Review client content and give clear feedback

- Reply to messages within 24 hours

- Host weekly group calls and 1-on-1 sessions

- Track client progress and update reports

- Join daily team check-ins

- Your role is to help clients succeed and stay long-term.



What We’re Looking For



- Strong English (written and spoken)

- Confident on Zoom calls

- Organized and detail-oriented

- Reliable internet

- Quiet workspace

- Consistent and accountable



Bonus if you have experience with short-form content, Instagram, TikTok, YouTube Shorts, or AI tools like ChatGPT and CapCut.



How to Apply



Send a message with “CSM” as the subject line.



Include ONLY:



#1: Your CV

#2: Years of short-form content experience

#3: Years of client management experience

#4: One sentence explaining why you are a strong fit

#5: Your portfolio



Applications that do not follow this format will not be reviewed.



P.S. Recruitment is managed by Young Publisher. Successful candidates will work under Social Influence Consulting LLC.

title: Recruiting Specialist
description:
This is for a full time remote position with a US-based retail merchandising company that has been in business for over 25 years, with over 15,000 employees in the field. This is a fully remote position working within the Corporate HR/Recruiting Department. Working hours are US Central time. Must have reliable wifi and computer at home to perform this role. Must be very comfortable speaking on the phone with US Candidates. 



We are proud to offer benefits for this role including PTO, Floating Holidays, Computer Allowance, Health Care Stipend, and 13th Month Pay.



Essential Duties

Ensure a continuous flow of merchandiser applicants on a national level to handle

routine spikes in field merchandising recruitment by utilizing web-based recruitment

resources

Review applications and conduct phone screen interviews for variable hour field

merchandising staff with applicants to determine their suitability for placement

Maintain department workflow tracking procedures and participate in active

communication with the Recruiting Team, Recruiting Supervisor, and Human Resources

Manager

Achieve and maintain a minimum average of 7 candidates screened and submitted for

consideration per working day, with an average of 60% of those submitted completing an

electronic intake process, equating to 21 candidates completing intake per 5 day week

Other duties as assigned



Must demonstrate effectiveness in the following areas:

o Outstanding English communication and interpersonal skills 

o Excellent time management and organizational skills

title: Turn Telegram Contacts into $5,000/Month: DeFi Protocol Needs BD Now
description:
Job Description:

We’re a DeFi protocol launching game-changing LP bond technology. We need Business Development partners who can introduce us to crypto launchpads, blockchain projects, and DeFi communities.





THE OPPORTUNITY:

Every successful introduction that leads to partnership earns you serious money. One good partnership could net you $5,000-10,000 in your first month.





COMPENSATION:

Monetize your network through three massive income streams: guaranteed ETH salary, instant token unlocks, and recurring commissions. We pay you to open doors you’ve already built, while we handle 100% of the closing.



Guaranteed Base Pay: You will receive $10/hour (capped at 10 hours/week),       for simply activating your network. 50% paid in Ethereum (ETH) for immediate cash and 50% in $GMI tokens, which are subject to an 18-month vesting schedule, building a long-term position in the $GMI mutli-chain ecosystem.



Performance Bonus: Every 5 successful partnership you close triggers an immediate unlock of 20% your vested tokens. This allows you to bypass the 18-month vesting period and access your earnings as soon as you deliver results.

Note: A "successful partnership" is defined by the project signing the LP Bonds integration agreement and going live on our marketplace.



Additional Commission: 

- 25% commission on ALL upgrade fees from your partnerships

- Level 2 upgrades: $40 upgrade fee, you get $10 each

- Level 3 upgrades: $80 upgrade fee, you get $20 each

- Level 4 upgrades: $160 upgrade fee, you get $40 each



-  $500 bonus when your partnerships hit 25 Level 4 bonds

-  $2,000 bonus at 100 Level 4 bonds

-  $5,000 bonus at 300 Level 4 bonds

-  Realistic month 1 earnings: $2,000-5,000

- Total 90-day potential: $20,000+



YOU HAVE:

- Existing connections in crypto (launchpads, DAOs, blockchain projects)

-
/
 relationships with project founders or marketing heads

- Understanding of DeFi/crypto space

- Hunger to earn based on results, not hours





YOU DON’T NEED:

- To close deals (I handle that)

- Any upfront investment

- Previous BD experience (connections matter more)

- Full-time commitment (work your own schedule)





THE ROLE:

Simply introduce me to decision-makers at crypto projects. I close the deals, you collect commissions. Every user from your partnerships who upgrades their bonds puts money in your pocket..

Example: ONE medium-sized launchpad partnership generating 100 L4 bonds = $8,000 for you.



Ready to turn your crypto connections into serious income?



Apply with:

- List 3-5 crypto projects/launchpads you have connections with

- Your
 handle

- Brief description of your crypto involvement



We need partners who see the opportunity and want to run with it. Start earning within days of your first successful introduction!

title: URGENT HIRING: Virtual Assistant - Administrator, IT and Accounting Xero Certified and have Australian Accounting
description:
You only get one chance: carefully follow these instructions before applying or you will not hear from us. To apply you must visit our webpage 
/job-opportunities/undergraduate-to-senior-accountant/



Company: Health and Life



Location: Remote (with own internet and office facilities)



Job Type: Contract (may go long term depending on performance)



About Us:

Health and Life Access is a well-established healthcare consulting Chartered Accounting firm organisation specialising in the management of service entities and organizations throughout Australia and overseas. We are committed to creating a sustainable and socially responsible healthcare system.



Job Description:

We are seeking a highly skilled and experienced Virtual Assistant to provide administrative, IT, and accounting support to our organisation and clients. The successful candidate will report to the CEO and relevant supervisors, ensuring the smooth and efficient operation of our business.



Key Responsibilities:

Provide administrative, IT, and accounting support to the CEO and other consultants/managers.

Maintain accurate records, perform bookkeeping, and handle client billing.

Assist with financial reporting, budgeting, and petty cash management.

Manage calendars, appointments, and correspondence.

Develop and maintain effective working relationships with staff, clients, and suppliers.

Identify and resolve problems promptly, providing potential solutions.

Participate in special projects and additional duties as required.



Requirements:

Xero Certified and have Australian Accounting experience preferred.

Proven experience in administration, IT, and accounting.

Proficiency in using Google Suite, Xero, FileMaker Pro, and other software as specified.

Strong organisational and communication skills.

Ability to work independently and as part of a team.

Commitment to maintaining confidentiality and adhering to ethical standards.

Ability to work under pressure and manage multiple tasks efficiently.



Working Conditions:

Standard 38-hour week, Monday to Friday, 8:30 am to 5:00 pm ACDT.

Flexible working hours may be required.

Must have own internet and office facilities.

No leave entitlement applies

All tasks are allocated by a Google calendar. The more you complete competently and within budget, the more work you generate.



Fees:

Task-based monthly fees up to $3,000 AUD or equivalent overseas currency. Long term contract positions available based on performance.



Fees reviewed based on performance; potential for multiple fee increases for good performance.



How to Apply:

If you are a motivated and detail-oriented individual with a passion for healthcare administration.



To apply visit our ”Undergraduate up to senior accountant jobs” web page 
/job-opportunities/undergraduate-to-senior-accountant/.



Attention to detail matters, so read the application process carefully. You only get one chance.

title: Overnight Recruitment and Scheduling Specialist Remote | Freelance
description:
We are looking for a highly organized, reliable, and proactive freelancer to join our team in an overnight role supporting our recruitment operation.



This position plays an important part in helping qualified candidates move through the hiring process efficiently. You will be responsible for candidate outreach, pre screening, follow up, interview coordination, and keeping activity organized across active hiring campaigns.



We are looking for someone who is confident communicating with candidates, detail oriented, able to work independently, and comfortable keeping multiple moving parts on track in a fast paced remote environment.



What this role involves



Reaching out to candidates through calls, texts, and online messages



Reviewing candidate information and identifying who may be a fit based on role requirements



Pre screening candidates for qualifications, communication, location, licensing, and overall alignment



Scheduling interviews based on client availability



Following up with candidates to confirm attendance and keep the process moving



Updating notes and candidate activity accurately in our systems



Communicating clearly with the internal team regarding candidate status, scheduling updates, and follow up needs



Helping ensure campaigns stay active, organized, and moving forward overnight



What we are looking for



Previous experience in recruitment, sourcing, interview scheduling, appointment setting, or candidate coordination is strongly preferred



Strong written and verbal English communication skills



Professional, friendly, and confident communication style



Strong attention to detail and ability to stay organized



Ability to work independently and remain productive in a remote setting



Comfortable using spreadsheets, messaging platforms, and online systems



Dependable, responsive, and consistent with follow up



Experience supporting recruitment or staffing teams is a plus



Experience in insurance related recruiting is a plus, but not required



Schedule



This is an overnight freelance role, so applicants must be available to work consistent overnight hours.



Why this role matters



This role helps keep our hiring process moving smoothly by making sure qualified candidates are contacted, screened, scheduled, and followed up with in a timely and professional way. We are looking for someone who takes ownership of their work, communicates well, and understands the importance of keeping 
ntum in a recruitment pipeline.



How to apply



To apply, please send us the following through OnlineJobs message:



Your resume



A 2 minute introductory video telling us about yourself and why you believe you have the experience and skills to succeed in this role

title: Experienced Direct Response Copywriter – $2,000–$4,000/Month
description:
Work Hours: Full-time, Mon–Fri, day shift



ABOUT US



Young Publisher | 



- We’re an international digital publishing company

- We've been hiring Filipinos for over 5 years

- We offer long-term roles

- We don't disappear, we pay on time



ABOUT THE ROLE



We’re looking for an experienced Direct-Response Copywriter who can:



- Take full ownership of performance-driven campaigns

- Write
s that get opened, read, and clicked

- Create stop-scrolling ads

- Craft persuasive copy that drives readers to act



This is a full-time role with clear growth opportunities. You’ll start with
s and ads, and as you prove yourself, move into sales pages and VSLs.



RESPONSIBILITIES



- Write broadcast
s and automated sequences

- Create Meta ad copy and video scripts

- Help produce ebooks and lead magnets using AI tools

- Progress into sales pages and VSL scripts for launches



BENEFITS



- Get direct feedback from an 8-figure copywriter: a serious opportunity to sharpen your skills fast.

- Get access to premium courses and AI communities. We invest in our team because we want long-term growth.

- We encourage AI tools — but only with strong critical thinking. This is not a beginner role.



ROLE SUMMARY



- Full-time (Mon–Fri, 8 AM - 5 PM PH Time)

- Long-term position with growth into sales pages and VSLs

- $2,000 – $4,000 USD per month, depending on experience

- Fully remote

- Reliable, on-time payments every two weeks via Wise



REQUIREMENTS



- At least 2 years of direct-response copywriting experience (not blog or content writing)

- Proven results: open rates, CTR, conversions, ROAS

- Experience writing for coaches, course creators, or info product businesses

- Native-level English for US, UK, or Australian audiences

- Strong understanding of hooks, emotional triggers, objection handling, and CTAs

- Experience with Meta ad copy and video scripts

- Ability to adapt to different brand voices

- Comfortable using AI tools with critical thinking

- Strong communication skills and independence

- Reliable, responsive, proactive, and coachable



HIRING PROCESS



#1: Paid test task

#2: Interview

#3: Paid test month at 50% salary



We’re looking for professionals who know their craft and want long-term growth.



HOW TO APPLY



Apply via our Typeform here: 
/to/CZb9go1y



Note: Only shortlisted candidates will be contacted.



Young Publisher



P.S. Young Publisher is the recruitment company. Successful candidates will work under Social Influence Consulting LLC.

title: Track and Trace Assistant
description:
GH Logistics is a high performance freight brokerage and asset based logistics company specializing in dry van and reefer freight. We move quickly, but we move with structure. Our operation is built on real time visibility, disciplined execution, and clear communication. We take pride in keeping freight organized, on track, and moving cleanly from pickup to delivery. If you’re someone who enjoys staying engaged, solving live challenges, and being part of a fast moving operations team, you’ll feel right at home here.



Role Overview

As a Track & Trace Assistant, you serve as part of the operational backbone, ensuring shipments are accurately monitored, risks are identified early, and critical information reaches the right people at the right time. if you thrive behind the scenes keeping operations running smoothly, this role is an excellent fit.



What You’ll Be Doing

• Updating assigned sections of the Tracking Dashboard with accurate ETAs, locations, mileage, and notes

• Communicating with carriers via
 and internal channels to gather updates or resolve missing information

• Verifying that carriers are properly assigned, accepted, and actively tracking in required platforms

• Monitoring multiple communication channels to prevent missed updates

• Proactively flagging delays, risks, and irregularities, and escalating when necessary

• Coordinating with the Booking Team to confirm ETAs for time sensitive shipments

• Ensuring clean shift handoffs through verbal (Zoom) and written updates

• Follows instructions consistently and executes with precision

• Team oriented, coachable, and open to feedback without ego



What Success Looks Like

• Assigned tracking sections are consistently accurate and up to date

• Scheduled updates are sent on time

• Critical shipments are monitored closely and handled with urgency from start to finish

• Carrier tracking and acceptance issues are caught early

• Issues are communicated clearly, both verbally and in writing

• Shift handoffs are smooth, complete, and well documented



Who We’re Looking For

• Has experience in US logistics, freight brokerage, or track & trace

• Familiar with US geography and US logistics trucking operations (a plus)

• Highly organized and comfortable working with multiple spreadsheets, dashboards, and group chats

• Understands urgency and prioritization in a live freight environment

• Communicates clearly and professionally via chat and

• Can monitor multiple shipments at once without losing accuracy

• Pays strong attention to detail and uses sound judgment when issues arise

• Follows instructions consistently and values clean processes

• Works well with a team and is open to feedback and coaching. Collaborates without resistance or ego



Why Join GH Logistics?

• Structured systems and clear expectations

• Hands on leadership and direct feedback

• Defined KPIs and measurable growth

• Opportunity to grow within a scaling freight brokerage

• Performance based advancement



Schedule & Work Setup

• Full Time Remote Role| Direct Hire to US Company

• Current Shift Availability: Monday - Friday 7 AM - 5 PM CDT & Saturday 7 AM - 12 PM CDT

• Other shifts (only if assigned): 3 PM - 1 AM CDT & 11 PM - 9 AM CDT

• Zoom presence (with camera open and unmuted audio) required

• Time tracking software used for accountability and performance support



This role is built for someone who genuinely enjoys following freight in motion, monitoring shipments, confirming updates, and making sure deliveries stay on track. If you like staying proactive, spotting risks before they become problems, and keeping operations running smoothly behind the scenes, you’ll fit right in.



Apply Here: 
/team/
/GHApplicationForm



Visit us:

Full-Time | 40,000 PHP per month



If you love design and enjoy experimenting with AI tools, this role is for you!

- Combines creativity with technology

- Is excited about creating AI images

Young Publisher |

BENEFITS



- 40,000 PHP per month starting salary

- Full-time, stable position

- Monday to Friday, 8:00 AM – 5:00 PM PH time

- Paid every two weeks via Wise

- Canva Pro and AI tool subscriptions provided

- Clear workflows and expectations

- Supportive team environment

- Long-term growth opportunities



RESPONSIBILITIES



- Create Canva graphics for social media and e-books

- Generate and refine AI images

- Align visuals with brand guidelines

- Create simple marketing videos

- Manage social media design schedules

- Design and upload sales pages

- Maintain organized visual asset libraries

- Ensure consistent visual branding



REQUIREMENTS



- Advanced Canva skills (Pro experience required)

- Experience using AI image generation tools

- Strong prompt-writing ability

- Ability to improve AI-generated outputs

- Basic video editing knowledge

- Understanding of social media image formats

title: Financial Accountant - AU Company
description:
Who is Bare?

Bare is the new way to funeral. We are a holistic end of life care provider, allowing our families to grieve in their own way, at their own pace, knowing their loved one is cared for by a team who truly understand their needs.



By combining empathy with technology, we’re creating end-of-life experiences that are simple, personalized and affordable. In only five years, we’ve served more than 30,000 families, have become Australia’s most awarded end-of-life provider (with awards in customer service, innovation and digital disruption), and have built a team of more than 100 people committed to changing the way Australians deal with end-of-life. And we’re just getting started.



We’re looking for a passionate and detail-oriented Financial Accountant to join our high-performing remote team. If you're a proactive finance professional who thrives on ownership, continuous improvement, and meaningful work, we’d love to meet you.



What You’ll Be Doing

As our Financial Accountant, you’ll be a key player in ensuring accurate, insightful, and timely financial reporting. You’ll collaborate across teams, drive process improvement, and uphold the financial integrity of our mission.



Key Responsibilities:

-Own the Month-End Close

Lead all aspects of EOM: journal entries, reconciliations, accruals, and financial statement prep.

-Deliver Insightful Reporting

Produce monthly and quarterly management reports, including variance and trend analysis.

-Ensure Regulatory Compliance

Prepare BAS, IAS, and statutory filings, ensuring alignment with AASB and tax standards.

-Champion Continuous Improvement

Streamline workflows, introduce automation, and enhance internal controls.

-Collaborate Cross-Functionally

Partner with Marketing, Operations, and other non-finance teams to align on budget and strategy.

-Support Strategic Projects

Get involved in cost analysis, ERP upgrades, and special projects that shape our financial future.



Why Join Bare?

Make a Meaningful Impact: Your work directly supports families during one of the most vulnerable times of their lives.

Remote-First Flexibility: Work from anywhere in Australia with the tools and autonomy to succeed.

Mission-Driven Culture: Join a team that leads with empathy and integrity—where your voice matters.

Growth & Innovation: Help shape scalable systems in a business that's growing fast and disrupting the norm.



About You

You’re not just technically sharp, you bring heart and high standards to everything you do. You thrive in fast-paced environments and care about doing work that matters.



Must-Haves:

-Bachelor’s degree in Accounting, Finance, or similar.

-CPA/CA qualification (or in-progress).

-2–3+ years' experience in financial accounting, ideally in service-led sectors.

-Familiarity with Australian accounting standards, BAS/IAS, and financial reporting.

-Understanding of various accounting standards relevant to Bare and consolidations of many entities.

-Attention to detail and excellent reconciliation skills

-Strong ERP (MYOB, Xero, SAP) and Excel skills.

-Strong Excel/Sheets skills and automation of manual processes in your mindset-DNA



Nice-to-Haves:

• Experience in mission-driven sectors (healthcare, aged care, funeral services).

• Adaptability in high-growth or high-volume environments.

• Resilient, working with little or no supervision.

• Experience of managing international teams, interaction with multi-entity organizations, and experience within companies with a minimum annual revenue of $50 million.

• Handle ambiguity, competing priorities, and strict deadlines. Create and implement scalable processes, including training. Integrate AI and automation.



Core Values We Look For

• Empathy: You care deeply about people—colleagues and customers alike.

• Accountability: You take ownership and deliver results with pride.

• Clarity: You communicate financial information in a clear, human way.

• Curiosity: You’re always looking for a better way and love solving problems.



Perks & Benefits

-Fully remote work setup with flexible hours

-Purpose-driven work with real human impact

-Growth and learning opportunities in a scale-up environment

-Supportive, inclusive team culture



Please include your resume when submitting your application. Thank you!

title: TikTok Paid Advertising Specialist — Beauty & eCommerce
description:
TikTok Paid Advertising Specialist — Beauty & eCommerce

Location: Remote (Philippines-based)

Type: Full-Time

Level: Mid–Senior

Daily Rate: ?2,500 – ?3,000



About the Role

Hair Doctors is a fast-growing Australian haircare brand launching our eCommerce store across two product ranges, a clinical hair supplement line and a Korean-formulated haircare range. 



We are building our TikTok presence from the ground up and want a specialist who has done this before, not someone learning on the job with our budget.



We are not looking for a social media manager who also does paid ads. We are looking for a performance-focused TikTok advertising specialist who understands how to turn content into sales, someone who knows how brands like Bondi Boost built exponential revenue through TikTok by combining organic credibility with paid amplification.



If you have run TikTok ad campaigns for a beauty, haircare, skincare, or consumer health brand, know how to identify winning creative before spending significant budget, and understand the full funnel from Spark Ad to Shopify checkout, this role is built for you.



Core Accountabilities

Campaign Strategy & Management

- Develop and manage our TikTok paid advertising strategy end-to-end: campaign structure, audience targeting, budget allocation, and bidding strategy

- Build and manage campaigns across all relevant TikTok ad formats: Spark Ads, In-Feed Ads, Video Shopping Ads, and Catalog campaigns

- Structure campaigns correctly from the start, awareness, consideration, and conversion objectives in the right sequence

Manage our TikTok Ads Manager account daily, monitoring performance, adjusting bids, pausing underperformers, and scaling winners

- Coordinate TikTok pixel and Events API setup with the Shopify team to ensure accurate attribution and tracking



Spark Ads Core Responsibility



- Guide our in house content creators to make well performing organic TikTok content. 

- Identify organic content from our brand account and from creator posts that has the right signals to be amplified as a Spark Ad

- Manage the Spark Code authorization process with creators, brief them correctly, obtain codes, and pull their posts into Ads Manager

- Understand what makes a Spark Ad perform versus a standard In-Feed Ad and apply that knowledge to creative selection

Build a Spark Ads pipeline, always have the next two to three pieces of content ready to test as existing ads fatigue

- Monitor Spark Ad performance at the creative level: completion rate, engagement rate, click-through rate, cost per purchase and brief creators on what is working



Creative Strategy & Briefing

- Define what creative works on TikTok for haircare and beauty products: hooks, formats, lengths, calls to action — based on platform knowledge and data

- Brief UGC creators and micro-influencers on exactly what to film: hook, key message, product demonstration, and call to action without over-scripting and killing authenticity

- Identify winning creative frameworks: before and after, routine integration, hair transformation, product unboxing, doctor-backed credibility and build a testing matrix around them

- Review creator content before it is posted and provide specific feedback aligned to TikTok best practice

- Understand the difference between content that performs organically and content that performs as a paid ad, these are not always the same

- Work with the broader team to ensure landing pages match the creative promise of the ad



Performance & Optimisation

- Set up correct campaign tracking: TikTok Pixel, Events API, and UTM parameters in coordination with the Shopify operations team

- Report weekly on key performance metrics: ROAS, CPM, CPC, CTR, cost per purchase, and video completion rate

- Run structured creative tests: test one variable at a time, gather sufficient data before calling a winner, and document learnings

- Monitor for creative fatigue and proactively refresh content before performance drops significantly

- Build a retargeting strategy: warm audiences who have viewed content, visited the store, or added to cart but not purchased

- Scale winning campaigns intelligently: know how to increase budget without killing performance



Creator & Community Coordination

- Identify and vet micro-influencers in the haircare, beauty, and wellness space who are a genuine fit for our brand

- Manage outreach, seeding, and Spark Code coordination with creators

- Build and maintain a database of creators: performance history, content quality, audience demographics, and engagement rates

- Coordinate creator relationships in a way that generates a consistent pipeline of authentic content





Who You Are



- Has run TikTok paid advertising campaigns specifically for a beauty, haircare, skincare, or consumer health eCommerce brand. This is the core requirement

- Understands the TikTok algorithm and how paid amplification interacts with organic performance

- Knows what creative works for product-based brands on TikTok. You can look at a video and tell within seconds whether it will perform or not

- Has experience with Spark Ads specifically, not just awareness of them, but has set them up, managed authorization codes, and optimized them

- Has managed a Shopify-connected TikTok campaign, understands how the pixel works, how the product catalogue integrates, and how to read attribution data

- Data-driven: you make decisions based on numbers, not feelings or aesthetic preference

- Proactive and self-directed:  you identify problems and opportunities without being asked

- Strong written English for creator briefs, reporting, and async team communication

- 3–5 years of TikTok advertising experience at a hands-on level

- Prior experience working with Australian, US, or UK clients strongly preferred





Platform & Technical Skills (Non-Negotiable)

TikTok Ads Manager

- Fully proficient in TikTok Ads Manager:  campaign creation, ad group structure, targeting, bidding, and budget management

- Has set up and managed Spark Ads campaigns. Understands the authorization process, code management, and how Spark Ads differ from standard In-Feed

- Has set up Video Shopping Ads and Catalog campaigns connected to a Shopify product feed

- Understands TikTok's campaign objectives and when to use each: Reach, Traffic, Video Views, Community Interaction,  Product Sales

- Knows how to structure a full-funnel TikTok campaign — awareness at the top, retargeting in the middle, conversion at the bottom



Tracking & Attribution

- Has installed and validated the TikTok Pixel on a Shopify store

- Understands TikTok Events API and why server-side tracking matters for attribution accuracy post-iOS14

- Can set up and validate standard events — View Content, Add to Cart, Initiate Checkout, Purchase

- Understands UTM parameter structure and how to use them to track TikTok traffic in Google Analytics or Shopify analytics

- Can read attribution data critically. Understands the difference between last-click, view-through, and blended attribution



Creative Assessment

- Can analyze a TikTok video and identify its hook, message structure, and call to action

- Understands why the first two to three seconds of a TikTok ad determine whether it lives or dies

- Knows which creative formats perform for beauty and haircare: transformation, routine, before and after, testimonial, creator reaction, educational

- Can write a creative brief that gives a creator enough direction to produce high-performing content without killing their natural voice



Shopify Integration

- Has connected a TikTok Ads account to a Shopify store via the TikTok Sales Channel app

- Understands how the product catalogue syncs and how to troubleshoot catalogue errors

- Has run Video Shopping Ads using a Shopify product catalogue

- Can coordinate with a Shopify operations team on pixel validation and event mapping





Industry Knowledge (Important)

- Understands the haircare and beauty category on TikTok: key creators, content trends, and what drives purchase intent in this space

- Has studied or worked on campaigns similar to Bondi Boost's TikTok growth strategy. Knows how organic content, Spark Ads, and Video Shopping Ads work together

- Understands the consumer journey for a beauty product purchased through TikTok,  from first view to purchase, and can build a campaign strategy around it

- Aware of TikTok content guidelines and advertising policies for health, beauty, and supplement products, knows what claims can and cannot be made in paid content





Bonus (Not Required)

- Experience managing TikTok Shop in addition to external Shopify campaigns

- Experience running campaigns for a supplement or consumer health brand

- Experience coordinating micro-influencer seeding programmes alongside paid campaigns

- Klaviyo or
 marketing knowledge to understand how TikTok acquisition feeds into retention





How to Apply

Applications without demonstrated TikTok advertising experience for a product-based brand will not be progressed.

Please include:



A specific TikTok campaign you ran for a beauty, haircare, or consumer product brand — what the brief was, what you built, the creative approach, and the results including ROAS, CPM, and cost per purchase if available

Your experience with Spark Ads specifically — how you identified content to amplify, how you managed the authorisation process, and what performance looked like

Your view on what makes creative work on TikTok for a haircare brand — what formats, hooks, and calls to action drive the best results

How you structure a TikTok campaign from scratch for a new eCommerce brand with no existing audience

Your desired daily rate in PHP and your availability

Any TikTok Blueprint certifications or relevant credentials

title: Project / Contracts Administrator (Construction | Remote - AU)
description:
About the Role

We are looking for a highly organised and detail-driven Project / Contracts Administrator to support residential and remedial construction projects in Australia.



This role focuses on contract administration, procurement, cost tracking, and keeping project data accurate across multiple jobs. You will work closely with project managers to keep projects moving, on budget, and compliant.



Key Responsibilities



* Manage contracts including head contracts, subcontracts, variations and progress claims

* Prepare and issue RFQs and purchase orders, and track procurement schedules

* Assist with cost tracking, budget updates and cost-to-complete reporting

* Review and process subcontractor and supplier invoices against budgets

* Maintain Buildertrend (or similar) with up-to-date project data, selections and variations

* Coordinate approvals, shop drawings and consultant documentation

Desirable

title: Amazon FBA Operations Manager – (High-Volume OA/Wholesale Support)
description:

Your Role:



Cost Optimization: Identifying "Profit Leaks" in the sourcing process and finding ways to recover margin.



Sourcing Research: Finding high-volume, high-margin leads that fit our current model.



Growth Support: Assisting with high-level outreach to distributors and brands.



Skill Requirements

Amazon Expert: Must be proficient in Seller Central and FBA workflows.



Spreadsheet Ninja: Advanced Google Sheets/Excel skills for tracking unit costs and margins especially with SALES TAX states



Problem Solver: You must be able to explain one way you’ve saved a previous Amazon client money on their operations.



English Fluency: Professional written communication for US-based vendor outreach.



Tools: Experience with SellerAMP, Keepa, or Helium10 is a plus.
